text: this product starbucks via is a starbucks product. its good stuff. i live in seattle the home of starbucks. this price was cheaper than anywhere ive found for this quantity so i ordered. i thought it would take a few days to get here in a plastic envelope. nope 12 twelve days later it arrived and was shipped from tennessee with a packing slip with the official starbucks maiden on the invoice. come on starbucks does all of your roasted coffee ship to your coffee shops from the same location.....no distribution centers or anything that could mail a package a little more efficiently. 12 days from time of order to receipt is a long time for a package. i mail letters from seattle to the southeast every week that arrive in 3 days. this was slower than media mail.

this is the best butter i have ever tasted. it arrived quickly and in a styrofoam container with gel packs. it is worth ordering two or three cutting them down and freezing some for later. also makes great gifts.

emeril is awesome and this coffee is not just the bomb its the bam!!!!!!!!!!!it will wake you up............ it has a great flavor without being overpowering or bitter.if you are a coffeeholic i highly recommend it.my only problem is with the write up. it leads you to believe that there will be 2 boxes notjust one. maybe reword it somehow.but do not let that deter you................this is great stuff

everytime i go to europe i look for this particular chocolate bartheres nothing better then rum trauben nuss.it does indeed remind me of rum ice cream yum yumnow the best part about finding it is that it is my husbands gift for fathers day. i bought enoughof it to last in case you run out of itthank you for carrying it. we cant find it anywhere else.i cant wait to see the look on my husbands face... that will be my reward

the marzipan itself is really delicious. it is soft and the almond flavor really shines. i did not like that this seller has seriously overpriced the item but since i did not really do my homework and was looking for prime eligible items i really cannot complain too much! the product on its own however is divine. i would definitely buy it again and again!

i used these for a dark and white chocolate dipped madelaines. i tried to put them one by one with a very fined tip tweezer and was impossible. they stick together and cant be used for a design. however as a decorative piece alltogether it was pretty.

simply my favorite coffee available for tassimo. if you love a dark rich brew with delicious crema this is it. i never seem to be able to find this coffee in any grocery or big box store so i was happy to find it on amazon. had it shipped overnight and i am enjoying a cup now as i type this.

these are really good! ive used them on my diet program and theyre greatthe high protein content really helps to satisfy and theyre very tasty. the serving size is just rightenough to give me a snack without overdoing it. i plan to continue using these going forward just to have on handtheyre great calorie buys!

my review is about the variety rather than this vendor so unless my experience is an oddity or the vendors seeds differ this may not apply. the american yard long is not anything like the common cucumber variety in markets. it is more like a palebad cantaloupe or honeydew melon than a cucumber. looks exactly like a long melon with seeds in the center. slightly sweet but not sweet enough to make it a palatable melon substitute. too tender and sweet to pass for a cucumber.
some of the healthiest foods you can eat for how easy it is to prepare and ingest. i specifically love how spicy this one is. great stuff!!
i give this 4 out 5 stars simply because i hoped for more chocolate items! great amt. of stuff! love the box setup. all the candy really brought back memories. thanks

i ordered grove square kcups the cappuccino variety for my keurig brewer. as with all of the other kcup coffees ive purchased i expected it to be filled with coffee for my keurig to brew. unfortunately it is filled with instant coffee and flavored with creamer and sweetners. it tastes horrible. im pitching the rest its not even worth donating to our church. if id wanted sanka i would not have purchased an expensive coffee brewer the microwave would have been good enough! what i want is a cup of freshly brewed coffee. the product description did not disclose the fact that it is fake coffee. if a real cup of freshly brewed coffee is what you want from your keurig brewer do not buy this product!
summary: grove square kcups do not buy!

text: well i gave this product 4 stars because the purpose i used it for was not intended. i saw that it had 95 meat which was perfect in my mind for a cat diet and the price point was nearly half of that which is for cats.ftr cats and dogs have two completely and vastly varied nutritional needs in my research i recall reading that a cats diet is mainly 95 meat from which they derive their moisturewater from as well since cats hunt and eat small rodents and birds in nature this makes sense since the 5 veggie content is likely from eating cat grasses and the contents of their preys tummy at the time of death.i decided to purchase this food since it was only 2.56 a can at unleashed and i figured i would just add in a calcium supplement and taurine and cat vitamin supplement to make up for the missing bones which would provide the natural calcium source for cats and taurine since i dont believe dogs require as much taurine in their diets as cats would and vitamins to make up for the possibility that there may not be enough vitamins in just meat alone.my cats loved it. i have one very finicky girl kitty whom refuses to eat human foods which is a good thing and most junky cat foods another good thing and one male cat that eats whatever he can get his whiskers into. they both liked this. so i would consider feeding this to them in lieu of the more expensive cat foods after i compare the ingredients of this to that of cat foods and make up the missing vitamins and minerals however i am not happy with the fact that this cat food has the consistency of pate..it is all ground up meats and looks like refried beans... im going to search for a similar product which has shredded meat rather than this consistency

i love the dingo ringos! their round shape works well so that the dogs can hold them with their paws while chewing. the meaty part is imbedding in the middle of the ring so my dogs have to work at it to get it! i dont want them to ingest a lot of rawhide so its nice that they can work their teeth and gums and get a goodie without eating the whole thing! the dogs love these and it takes them a while to get to the meat so it keeps them busy for quite a while. my 10 lb mini dachshund is a very aggressive chewer and these hold up well. my 13 lb mini dachshund has a very soft mouth but still enjoys these. wonderful for the smaller dog!

these organic pouches i believe are less sweet than others. they are on the pricier side but i got them on sale when they offered a coupon on amazon so they were affordable. if they were not so expensive i would get more of them. i do not like that the pouch opening is on the side but i think that they are not meant to be eaten out of the pouch like the other types like earths best or plum organics which have spout on top which my daughter is use. they are also bigger pouches than most other types. my daughter is a pretty picky eater but she seemed to love them. she was hesistant at first of eating them but after a couple times she went for them when she saw them.

this stuff is absolute awful. just the worst pasta i have ever tasted in my life. i am one of those people who actually likes whole wheat spaghetti and yet found this unswallowable. the texture is horrendous.

this is super yummy! ill never go back to imitation maple syrup. it arrived in a timely manner and was packaged super secure. my little family adores this product and we will be ordering more soon im sure!

wrigleys elixir gum is good tasting but only for a very short period of time. i like the wrigleys 5 lush gum 1015 piece packs a crisp tropical sugarfree gum type much better and the flavor lasts longer but still not as long as other brands.you can do better than this one.
summary: good tasting sugarfree gum flavor tapers off fast

text: i dont think i have a particularly sensitive palate but this was truly undrinkable. i couldnt detect any flavors of pumpkin cinnamon or nutmeg. instead it had a strong plastic and metallic taste with a clove overlay. i like some of their other sugar free syrups but the pumpkin pie one was noxious. try to taste a sample before you order a huge bottle.

on the plus side both my son and i loved loved loved the taste of these. these really are snappy ginger snaps. but on the minus side my mother was afraid to eat them because they are so hard. she was afraid shed break her veneers. so these cookies get a big thumbs up for taste but a thumbs down too because they are way harder then they ought to be.

these bars are slightly dry in my opinion. my sister raves about these bars so i gave my entire order to her. i prefer my bars more moist and soft these are almost crunchy but the taste is very good for 90 calories!

this sauce is salty. before you use the sauce you need to try it yourself. then when you use it you are only suppose to use it in small quantities as in small spoonfuls. add a little bit first taste the dish and then add more. this isnt a type of sauce that you can just slather on to something. when you stir fry with it lets say black bean chicken add a little bit taste and then add more.do not add any additional soy sauce to your dish. black bean sauce is pretty much black beans salt soy sauce and oyster sauce. you do not need to add any additional salt or soy sauce.i bought this sauce because if im short on time and i dont have time to soak black beans this is a good substitute.just a warning sampling the sauce itself is essential but it is so salty that it may make you gag. however it is delicious when used in correct quanitities and spread over meat.let me remphasize small quantities.
i gave a pet dog plural resemblance products but have got tired directly so far.however the pet dog continues greenies and wants it.
summary: the pet dog is delighted too!

text: i have had about a dozen varrieties of strawberry tea since last spring and have enjoyed some immensely. this one is just not as sweet or flavorful as the others i have tried. in the overall spectrum it is not the worst but certainly the others with more fruit in them are more to my preferance. jim mulcahy
summary: not as sweet as other teas.

text: i started using this product a few months ago when i read about giving coconut oil to my black shih tzu pucci as a dietary supplement. he liked it immediately and his coat is glossy and his skin unblemished. i have also smooshed some into his hair before his bath as a conditioner with great success. i started eating it myself it has a very pleasant mild taste and i apply it to my hair and skin before a shower which makes even my hard feet smooth and soft without being greasy. it absorbs into the skin nicely. i thought the claims of a miracle product were merely the swoons of hippie health nuts but this product has enhanced my life and the life of my dog. i like nutiva products in general so that is why i chose it for the coconut oil and it seems wonderful in all aspects. it is part of my routine now. this size jar also seems to be an excellent value for a quality product.

this buckwheat is very flavorful while uncooked. however it is driedroasted in such way that if you cook it the standard way you will end up with mush. you have to follow the recipe on the bag or some variation of it in order to get the grainy consistency. to me this method of cooking is more complicated than what i am used to and to a certain degree compromises the flavor. i am used to the kind of buckwheat that you can cook in a rice steamer and it does not turn to mush.i know in nonorganic world there are better products. not sure if there is any organic buckwheat that is better than this.i absolutely love the cracked buckwheat variety by this company that kind is usually cooked to be mushy and there the dryingroasting method used by this company puts it well above anything else i tried.
summary: not as good as i expected

text: i bought two of these for christmas to give to my husband. the chocolates on the inside were ghirardellis typical high quality individually wrapped chocolates. the problem was with the ornament. it was extremely hard to open. i wouldnt suggest this as a gift idea for anyone who has trouble opening containers like grandmas and grandpas with arthritis. its about the size of a softball so it does make nice decoration for people who can utilize all the muscles in their hands and are up to the task of trying to open the thing.
summary: delicious ghirardelli chocolates that are nearly impossible to get into

text: i bought the tea to lose weight as on dr oz but have not had any results. would not buy it again.

stopped giving this product to my 9 yr old lab mix because she developed really bad diarrhea. now i have her on probiotics and scheduled a vet appointment. other than her having a weight issue she has never been sick. sorry i switched to this food.

i was expecting something more.blueberries very small pieces and not many of them.clusters where did they go?! when you look at the pictures of this product and other types of their granola it would appear that you are getting a bag of large clusters. not the case there are almost no clusters. the biggest cluster i found in all 3 bags was the size of a dime.taste good when you get some of everything.with all the other products out there i dont think i will be purchasing this one again.

i buy this as well as the white sticky rice for 2 of my kids with celiac disease. they love rice and this type is hard for me to replicate at home. the price through subscribe save is definitely better than that found in the stores! the rice makes a convenient snack or sometimes ill send it to school with them for lunch. they have microwave accessibility.

i really love peace cereals. the company has such great values 10 of all profits go toward peace making efforts that is why the cereal is higher in price than most cereals.except for the price high sodium low fiber and small amount in the box all of the cereal flavors are great tasting! i like it despite these drawbacks because of the peace efforts the natural ingredients the freshness the spices and the mix of oat clusters and flakes.i especially love the mango passion cereal flavor it has a great spice flavor with cardamom! serve with great tasting soymilk and fresh fruit and you have a great breakfast! some flavors but not all include peace cereal mango passion low fat crisp 10.5ounce boxes pack of 6 peace cereal maple pecan crisp 14ounce boxes pack of 6 peace cereal raspberry ginger low fat crisp 14ounce boxes pack of 6 peace cereal wild berry low fat crisp 10.5ounce boxes pack of 6 peace cereal apple cinnamon crisp 10.5ounce boxes pack of 6
summary: enjoy food thats good for the world

text: along with the peter pan peanut butter peter pan creamy peanut butter 40ounce jars pack of 3 these were a mainstay of days without power here in sw va 1st week of july 2012 suggest keeping at least three packs sealing in air tight plastic container and rotate as water in an emergency kit. they are in individual wrapped stacks in each box.
summary: exceelent product even better in an emergency supply kit...

text: just a hint of honey and lemon perfect balance great taste doesnt even need to be sweetened.

my wife loves this tea. i tried a cup and i like it too even though im a coffee drinker.the problem is 5 out of every 6 kcups weve used have split open and spread the groundup tea all over the place. it takes the fun out of having this type of coffeetea maker if you have to clean it after every cup.weve bought these before from a different source and didnt have this problem. were hoping this was just a bad batch. at any rate if you buy these be aware that you may have many cleanups in your future.i gave it 3 stars because the tea itself is so good.
jasmine tea is supposed to give you pretty dreams. and when combined with green tea it will give you healthy pretty dreams. love it!

i bought this for my husband who previously had to ship it from holland until we found this brand. other us brands were large chunks of root or was blended with tea. this is just the actual cut and chopped root pure and fresh. we scoop it up in a tea ball and steep and it makes a great tea. this is also by far the best price that weve found on it. the downside is that we have to buy two pounds. that is a lot of tea. however the bags are foil wrapped and sealed so the second bag will stay fresh until we are ready for it.

dandy blend is awesome! why drink coffee when you can drink dandy blend? coffee has lots of things in it that are bad for you check the web even though people dont like to admit it. dandy blend is a liver cleanser and it tastes great. you can drink it hot or cold. i usually drink it hot and add a little rice milk to it to give it that creamy taste. mmm yum. i think ill go drink a cup right now. it is so much better than all of the coffee substitutes out there. ive tried them all.

i used this product on toast instead of butter i used it to cook curry chicken. i used it to scramble eggs. i used it to flat iron my hair smooth i used it on my skin mmm. good vaginal lubricant too. also great for oil pulling. i read it can be used with baking soda as a natural toothpaste? havent tried that one yet. this product is well worth the money for its many uses.

i guess when i bought these i thought the box would be bigger and the items would be too. its a tiny box with tiny items for a huge price. the box arrived smashed so the bars inside were smashed as well and they are not like oreo cookies they have cookie bits on the bottom with a little marshmallow on top. these arent satisfying although theyd be ok if i hadnt paid so much for them! way too costly. its better and more satisfying to eat two oreo cookies.

i love that this sampler box actually comes with so many samples of all different types of flavored coffees. its exactly what i was looking for so i could try a bunch of different flavors and figure out which ones i like best. like other reviews say it is not a fancy gift box but if youre giving it as a gift it would be very easy to throw a bunch in a basket with creamer packs flavored coffee liquor coffee spoons and a mug tie a big ribbon on the handle and give it as a gift that way. there are plenty in one box to make at least 2 of these baskets. the poster it comes with is sort of silly but i just gave it to my niece to color on. i was only getting this for myself to try out flavors and im very happy with it. the price is great for this type of variety.

this product is not a blink and its gone bone. my 11yr. old chocolate labs chew time on one of these bones is truly long enough...so much so that i can sit and watch her enjoy the chewing and see she is content afterwards. with prime shipping and subscribe and save...each shipment costs 1.65 per bone or 3.30 a package...from amazon to our home. that includes the tax. there are 5 packages like you see in the picture each containing 2 large bones for a total of 10 bones at 16.55.

the assortment and taste is very good but they were order and delivered in the summer and they smell like they were in a fire. it doesnt affect the taste but the smoke smell is very noticeable. maybe they shouldnt be sent in hot weather or should be packed differently.

absolutely love the kcup very smooth tasting lots of flavor. so easy to get the cappuccino flavor at home by just popping one of these into your keurig machine instead of running out of the house and grabbing one.
the bones have sat on my floor for about a week now. i wish i could leave a better review but none of my four dogs like them.
i like snacks in portion control packs. these are great to throw in my lunch bag and keep me from over indulging.

this product was far better than i expected. i would recommend this item to anyone looking for a different and great tasting new breakfast meat. it was part of a traditional english breakfast i recently made for company and they we all impressed. thanks

five stars for taste packaging serving size. however walmart has them individually for only 88 cents per one ounce package! so you would only be paying 15.84 for 18 packages! thats a deal! youd be saving 3.17. plus you can mix and match different favors and you dont have to buy a whole lot of one flavor.

unfortunately i had to send my dolce gusto machine in for repair or replacement so i am currently on hold. since i used it for almost two months before it quit working i can tell you that i had a chance to try all the hot flavors that nescafe dolce gusto offers and i totally enjoyed each of them. i am not crazy about real strong coffee so the mild is perfect for everyday. although on days when i needed a little extra jolt i would drink the regular strength caffe lungo. i am anxious to get my machine back so i can once again enjoy the wonderful variety of coffees and hot chocolate available.
the dogs love this product and the price is very reasonable...packaged well and easy to use...will continue to get this for the pets
if anyone is on a diet or needs to eat more fiber this is for you. only 12 calories in a tb. but 3 tb. will fill you up. so for 36 calores you can have a healthy breakfast or snack!!!

i have 60 french doors. easy to install. no tools required. i did it alone. keeps the mosquitoes and flies out like it is supposed to and lets fresh air in. negatives you cant just walk though it. you will need to use your hands to open and close it. also my cats are dumb and it took them a while to figure it out maybe thats a positive since it keeps them out side. bottom line i would recommend this but you should know about the opening and closing issue.
summary: good but not hands free inout

text: i have two extremely aggressive chewers a lab and a dalmatian....and this bone keeps them busy for days. you do have to watch when the smaller top bones separate from the rest of the bone as they are chewed they could be a choking hazard. the sarge keeps both of my dogs interested even when the marrow and tendons have long since been eaten. great value for the price considering they last so long. if you want a bone that stimulates and satisfies this is it!

as a night worker im always looking for a new beverage with zip in it. almost any coffee product will do. it helps though to be fully cognizant of whats in the can before you make expectations.while i guess i was thinking this was going to be another in the long line of starbuckstype creamy and sweet coffee drinks this is nothing of the kind. there is just enough sweet to take off the bitter but this is very much an espressotype drink which if id bothered to read the can i would have realized.good enough for what it was and it did hike my alertness somewhat it comes in a small can nowhere near the size of even a regular canned coffee. the flavor was okay but for what stuff goes for these days the product could be a little more generous.

this humble little lady cat who spent her early years roaming the mean streets no longer has to scavenge for her food. she loves her fancy feast liver and chicken and eagerly devours it. she likes some other flavors of fancy feast canned too so i alternate once in a while carefully becuz cats need to take a while to get used to the other flavors of their cat foodiesmy only concerns are with the food coloring thats for the humans so they dont get grossed out by unexpected colors? certainly the cats dont care and the artificial flavor. but that does not stop me from giving it to cee cee after all she turns her nose up at all the other brands of cat food i get for her.

just bought a 12 pack of this and orange crush the orange crush is good not as good as i remembered but drinkable. the sunkist has a strange bitter taste to itmakes me feel like i gulped a chemical experiment not a refreshing beverage. its not as bad as the generic big k which is quite awful but i dont think i can finish the rest.

unlike microwave popcorn you cannot hear the pork skins cooking so only by trial and error and the wattage of your microwave will you know how long to cook these. cooked to the proper timing they will be fluffy melt in you mouth. 15 seconds too long you will have a stinky unedible product.it is something that you must try. i cooked mine for 1 minute 45 seconds and they were not all done. i do not know the wattage of my microwave.so try them for your self. as i said they are different than popcorn but have the same results if left too long in the micowave stinky.
the can is well filled with good fillets of eel. the taste is a little bland the smoked flavour is not very pronounced. makes a good pate with some onion and capers

this is the best product ever. i used to put regular peanut butter in my chocolate shakes and it would stick to the blender jar. just add a tablespoon of this powder in the jar and blend away. it is fantastic.
works great i bought it for my nephew who has celiac as a gluten replacement but tried it in my salad dressings and gravies. you just need the tiniest amount for it to thicken. love it.

this sweetener is wonderful for tea especially iced tea you can add it to hot or cold and it sweetens without being gritty like sugar or powdered sugar substitutes. it also works well for making margaritas use it in place ofthe sugar syrup healthier and time saving!the light agave does not have a strong taste and therefore it works well in everything tea lemonade coffee mixed drinks even baking. you can get a small 15 or 30ml bottle and fill it up to take out with you since most places dont have agave syrup available as a sweetener.

after looking all over town for a good price on this we finally found it in the natural section at kroger on sale for 2.50. i cannot believe i paid that much for this junk! first off it has absolutely no flavor and the textureconsistencythickness reminds me of dog food kibble. i know its supposed to be a low sugar cereal but it also has no flavor! it tastes like cardboard and i have to sprinkle sugar on top of it to tolerate it. i will never ever make the mistake of buying this stuff again!

i have been a fan of wintergreen altoids for years. when my last 12pack ran out i picked up a 2pack of tins at a local store. these taste nothing like they used to and in fact taste nothing like wintergreen at all. this flavour is like a combination of peppermint and ozone. i will not be buying any more until they follow cocacolas example and bring back a classic formulation. neither will i be consuming the remainder of this most recent package.
very yummy. mix with a tad bit of mayo and a yummy dip for shrimp or to put on a sandwich. it is hot so take that into consideration. we will buy again!

my husband has recently switched to drinking predominantly decaf and this was a good choice for him. hes a rare man one who enjoys flavored coffee. he likes the vanilla flavor and the low acidity is easy on his stomach. i enjoy it as well.
we love the taste of the cookiesmeringues and the price was better than at the store but many of the cookies were crushed which made them messy.
i love this coffee. its strong and bold without a bitter aftertaste. i have just placed an order for another one.

this tea is something different for the tea lover looking for a noncaffeinated herbal tea. its ok but a little like a watered down chocolate drink. its ok and ill finish it but i dont think ill buy it again after all my boxes run out whenever that is.

i too was unimpressed with the flavor of the finished latte. the tazo chai tea latte mix that is in the grocery store is far better and equally easy to make. i love the tassimo for the lattes and other coffees but this is one i will not buy again.

while deployed to afghanistan you get a little tired of eating at a chow hall... so i figured i had a microwave might as well order some curry and rice that i could zap up. and i have to say this curry was so delicious and totally hit the spot! and it helped that it had potatoes and vegetables in it as well. i definately reccomend this product
not only is this a good quality tomato paste but i love that its in jars. i dont have to worry about using it all at once and there no bpa lined cans to worry about.

i have had and ordered this product many times in fact i have 5 on the shelf right now. yes the sauce is really excellent considering how much sugar is in regular pizza sauce.the crust. i actually dont mind the crust it gets nice and crispy and yes it is very hearty due to high levels of fiber needed to counter the carb count. if you are a true low carb eater and looking to have a base to work from this is it. the benefit of low carb is i can add bacon italian sausage pepperoni etc on top. those ingredients out way the high fiber crust.find a lower carb crust and sauce than this stuff and i will look for it. its not out there. not to be negative towards the negative review but i feel many people go into eating a low carb pizza with a mindset that it will taste exactly like a regular pizza come on really?this is the best low carb pizza solution i have ever found. period.
excellent tea. normally i am a black tea drinker but this is an exception. superb when you have a cold or tummy ache. a must have on hand tea.

i bought the world king candy cigarettes from amazon.com i didnt know they made these anymore. in the 50s we would buy them. so this christmas all my brothers and sisters and friends will get a pack of these just to let them remember the 50s.
i have always loved twinings earl grey tea...usually loose or in teabags. i was delighted to find it available in a keurig pod and found it every bit as good as i had experienced in other modes.

if i had not found this tea for 3.50 a box instead of the 8.60 i paid on amazon i would have given it 5 stars. as far as the tea it is a 5 star tea great taste we love it! i bought 2 boxes at the 3.50 price at big lots so that should do us for awhile.
summary: great tea high price on amazon

text: tea is 10 3.99 ground shipping directly from republics website just saying....this tea is fantastic however i add a little mango juice to most green teas i brew....
summary: tea cheaper when ordered directly from republic

text: this product is made in australia and came via singapore. made no sense!!!! took more than 4 weeks to arrive. tim tams tasted good as usual but crumbled and fell apart on the first bite..... disappointing one more complaint is that the shipping was outrageously expensive we wont do that again.

ive been gluten free for a few years now and realize that getting decent gluten free products is not that easy. baking them yourself seems to be the logical options but cost and ability are great hindrances for many. i enjoy making pizza crust from scratch as i know exactly what is in it and in what quantities and i can fudge the recipe to make a crispier or doughier pizza depending on what i want. however when one flour or another is out or my starch is gone or im visiting a friend or family members house i grab this pizza crust mix.it mixes well every time without fail and tastes acceptable. just as the other reviewers say the crust isnt dry or crumbly it holds together well and makes a fair amount of pizza. its nothing to write mom about but it is decent consistent pizza dough.

this was my first time ordering organic spices and i am very pleased. it is very fresh smelling and tasted great! i love to use cumin in mexican and indian dishes. im storing mine in the fridge because i want it to stay fresh and it is a very large container. great healthy product and a good value.
salt free yay but it is showing up in the gf searches but it lists grain vinegar as one of the ingredients so is most likely not gf.
my wife and i love this coffee. the taste is awesome the hint of mocha makes the coffee sooo smooth.

i do a lot of grocery shopping at a nearby fresh and easy neighborhood market. theyre an english company that has only recently invaded southern california and arizona. theyre quite welcome i might add. in any case they carry a lot of foreign products primarily british and i enjoy trying them out. for example they have a small selection of english candies. my wife used to live in london and she says that european candies are better than american candies. she says that they tend to be less sweet and more flavorful. i would agree. so everytime i go to my local fresh and easy market i indulge in one and only one of their candy bars. this trip i bought a nestle aero mint chocolate bar. mmmmmm. good. excellent taste! and not so sweet that it hurts my teeth. delicious! im going to have to go to this store less often. things like this are just too hard to resist!gary peterson

this is by far the best alternative to french fries.. they are low calorie so light to eat. i will definitely keep ordering them reordering them. i love the fact that they give an assortment of flavors in each box. my family friends are constantly asking for another flavor to try.... good job making these smart fries...
summary: hands down the best low calorie snack

text: great productgood source of potassium. i dont know if its just my area but unsalted pistachios seem to be hard to locate. a perfect productunsalted pistachios and best price ive been able to track down. yeah.... theyre good too.

i have found this flavor of tazo tea to be hard to find and was very happy to have found it on amazon. this tea is delicious and thanks to amazon i now have enough to share with friends and family and not be so stingy.

earl grey is my favorite and i think the twinings brand was exceptional. whenever i make it i usually end up making two cups because im so sad when the first is gone. its not overly bitter at all and perfect with just a little sugar. not only that but its relatively cheap and comes with a nice tin.

i had some genmai cha at a local sushi place on a whim and was instantly hooked. while this may not be the same stuff that they served its even better. best green tea that ive ever had. powerful brown rice aroma with a warm popcorn like finish to the taste. love it.

the taste of the decaf tea was excellent but the tea leaves came through the kcup causing the tea to pour very slowly from the keurig machine. i had to strain my cup of tea into another cup to remove all the tea leaves.

i ordered this product because i love the cheezit brand. i tried this particular item after initial purchase at a grocery store. i received my item in a timely manner however it was not what i ordered. i received the 100 calorie pack item instead of the requested order. this was however one of the few times i have ordered from amazon.com and not received my correct order.

i ordered this product to be used as an accent to my sons birthday cake construction theme. i live in florida and it was 96 degrees today. the product was shipped to me in a plain bubble envelope and when i pulled it out it was mostly liquid chocolate with little bits of candy shell floating about. all of the rocks had completely melted and there was no salvaging it. very disappointing and frustrating.

i was excited to receive this product and try it out as an alternative to whey powder. upon opening the screw off lid i noticed some residue on the container and subsequently noticed that the seal on the opening of the container was in fact not sealed. due to amazon return policy i am unable to return this product for an exchange or a refund. i would have tried it anyway but the package states that refrigeration is required after opening. will not order this type of item from amazon again.
the ingredients in this food are good quality. our dog is allergic and still scratches his skin. switched to a salmon sweet potato dog food and it has helped.

as a parent im always looking for good treats that are good for my kids as well as pack in some protein for them! since i have a peanut allergy its hard for us to use the old standby pbjs so this chocolate almond butter is so yummy! i bought them for the kids but im eating them all as well!!
i tried to stay away of the coffee so i deceiced to have one cup a day of decaf...well with this one i actually drink 2 a day taste real good.

...but when you dont have a tims nearby this is pretty great! if im getting something at tim hortons i tend to get the coffee but i love their hot chocolate. when im making this at home i put a little soy milk in with the mix because it makes it creamier and more like it is at the actual restaurant. i think its the best hot chocolate mix out there.
summary: not quite as good as at timmys...

text: i love these but sometimes the cheese doesnt mix in as easy as the less healthy versions. when it doesnt mix well the cheese powder has kind of a funky spicy flavor. other than that good product.

i was hopeful but left unsatisfied. the color of the bean grounds says it all a light brown not the typical dark brown to black of real espresso even decaf. taste is weak and odd not rich and solid. certainly not worth the extra . recommend cafe bustelo instead.

i ordered the 6 pack of sheltons turkey jerky. with great anticipation i opened the first package. much to my disappointment the jerky was quite dry and brittle. i was hoping for something more like trader joes turkey jerky which is always moist and tasty. i will eventually eat what i ordered but unlike the trader joes brand this stuff will hang around until im desperate for anything to munch on.
summary: very very dry turkey jerky if you like trader joes jerky you wont like this

text: tater mitts ? a miserable product!cumbersome uncomfortable no potato left by the end of the peeling .... then adding insult to injury you have to cleanup the gloves the sink after making the mess. the only positive point is that our family gets a good laugh every christmas by mentioning that a certain family member passedup giving us tater mitts this year. everyone is glad that they found something else to give everyone this year !

i search for usa made products for my dogs all the time and was very glad when i found this brand. our toy poodles love them. will continue to purchase these as long as the company keeps their manufacturing facility here in the us.

i bought two bags of these so i could get free shipping. i am glad i did because they are great! i have been eating them everyday and would buy this exact kind again! i am hooked. i use the goji berries with fresh ginger ground up in water as an antiinflammatory and they work. i have a lot of inflammation and drinking this goji drink keeps it down. i have to drink this drink throughout the day everyday as prescribed by my accupuncturist doctor.
summary: goji berries are fresh and reliable free shipping too!

text: long lasting chewy gum. got it for 50 off sale. its in my every bagcoat so i never run out.

mmmm its the time of year when i remember how yummy pumpkin tastes. so when i saw this pumpkin bread kit on sale i decided to give it a shot. the recipe was super easy. add a few eggs oil and water to the canned pumpkin and then add their prepackaged dry ingredients. i baked mine in a bundt pan baking directions are on the package. the mixture provided too much batter for the bundt pan. and even taking some out made for an overflowed baked product. the final product tasted fine. the texture was a bit chewier than expected. and the spice level was a little muted. im sure you could do better if you made it from scratch. but do you really want to do that?the box shows you can also make muffins so ill try that next time. i bet you can spruce these up with a little spice and maybe jazz up the icing with some cream cheese.
summary: nothing special. in between great and awful.

text: the pods are too thick for the coffee maker coffee and hot water everywhere do not buy these for senseo. when i contacted amazon i was amazed at how quickly they resolved for me yay amazon!
summary: dont purchase if you have a senseo coffee maker

text: i just wanted to leave a note of what the composition of the mixed flavors pack looked like. i had a hard time finding information on what exactly id get. im sure they change could change this from time to time but this is what i hadroctane gu packets 1 each blueberry pomegranatevanilla orange cherry lime pineapple. these are the high endurance packets. the blueberry pom and vanilla orange are both double caffeine and the pineapple has no caffeine.regular gu packets had 3 of chocalate outrage and vanilla bean. the rest had two of each flavor strawberry banana triberry expresso love mandarin orange jet blackberry mint chocolate lemon sublime. the strawberry banana mint chocolate and lemon sublime have no caffeine while jet blackberry and expresso love are double caffeine.if youre looking to shake it up or find a favorite flavor i think this is a good buy. i dont know that gu is the best energy gel out there i actually think everyone just has to find out what they like in taste and texture and what their stomach can handle. ive had good luck with gu myself and i look forward to trying all the flavors.
these sprinkles are the same as what resorts uses in wdw florida. i made cupcakes like ones at disney.

i bought this in an asian market for half this price listed but i wound up throwing it away after not being able to stomach the stuff. ive tried a few different types of matcha powder and unfortunately resorted to this as a substitute for my daily tea until my next shipment came in from japan. its downright awful. that picture on the bag is what a higher quality tea looks like the actual product turns out to be a muddy looking green. after my bad experience trying to use it in hot tea i tried putting this in smoothies baking with it using it in icecream nothing would take away the bitterness. i kept adding less and less matcha powder to my recipes but the bitter taste was there if there was any hint of green tea flavor.just save your money and buy some real matcha powder. dont convince yourself that youre enjoying it just because you so desperately want to enjoy matcha green tea. it isnt your fault if youve tried this and dont like it. if someone gave this to me for free i would politely refuse it. no way id regift something so terrible unless i hated the person!
got our storage drawer for a great price and really like the look and functionality but......the top platform where the keurig sits began to melt from the heat of the machine.

my wife had some coffee at the cafe darte coffee shop when visiting her mother last year. she raved about it so much that i contacted their web site to sample some. it was great. some friends who own a local restaurant which prides itself on its good coffee agreed that it was the best they ever had. i reordered several times before deciding to look up the price on amazon.short version same coffee much better price.

i discovered these candies at a frys electronics store of all places. they are wonderful! robust coffee flavor with just the right amount of sugar. they make a great pick me up or little something to tide you over between lunch and dinner. delicious and addicting. i have gotten four colleagues hooked on them too. could not find them for sale any longer at frys or anywhere else in town. i located them on amazon and got a smoking deal. definately worth a try.
the trap does not work. it seems to attract bugs but they just walk over it and keep on going...they don not get stuck.
summary: doesnt work bugs walk right over it and dont get stuck!

text: this is some of the best green tea out there! ill buy it again! the only thing about is that the stores around here dont carry it anymore!!!

gopicnic is a more healthy version of the lunchables that are so popular and this variety is quite good.for allergy sufferers the warnings for all the internal packets are printed clearly on the side of the box under the nutrition information. similarly all the ingredients are on an end panel and i can pronounce all of them. i like the lack of msg trans fats or the dreaded hfcs.everything in the package was fresh tasting and flavorful. the light crispy crackers have a ritzlike flavor. salmon spread had a good flavor with nice spice bite but not overpowering. a knife would have been a better implement rather than the included plastic fork for spreading the salmon. the ginger zip fruit nut mix was also fresh crispy but i didnt detect much ginger flavor even in the bits of coating that had come off the nuts. the edamame was crispy and crunchy lightly salty. the chocolate square is a nice dark chocolate but not bitter.with the addition of a beverage of your choice this would make a healthier option for lunch than a trip to the burger joint or the vending machine.the only down side to this type of meal is the amount of packaging. while the carton is made of 100 recycled fiber at least 35 postconsumer and can go into the recycling bin everything else goes in the trash. even that though is a minimum. the only plastic is the cup for the salmon and the fork. the rest is cellophane or foil wrap.though a homemade lunch may be cheaper this isnt a bad alternative.

while it seems strange to consider candy in season that is how holiday candy generally is. i purchased this autumn mix well after halloween and the result was stale. that worked because i was melting them down for a recipe. however they were not very good on their own. as is i would rate them 3 stars.however when i buy this mix locally in fall it is creamy and has a nice taste of honey. it is a great product and i would rate it 4 stars because as great as it is it is not quite what it used to be and tastes more artificial.given that i can fairly only rate what i was sent i will rate these 3 stars but if purchased in season they make both a nice fall treat and a nostalgic decoration. if they are sold where you live which is likely in the fall i suggest shopping around. they tend to be much more expensive online.

great vibrant colors in a very usable palette. blends easily in fondant icing and marcipan alike. just a tiny drop is sufficient for an entire batch which makes it extremely cost efficient. shipped and delivered in norway after just three days.
these cookies had a horrible taste nothing like the sesame cookies we get in new jersey. too many flavors competing with the anise. yuck.
have fed our siberian husky this food since she was old enough to eat solid food and she still eats it just fine and is in beautiful condition.
summary: hill science diet dry puppy food

text: fast delivery and the product were fresh with plenty of nuts. nice after school treat.

the product is great and so is the machine have had it for a year now. amazon has the best prices on pods. i am switching to auto delivery once a month and will now save even more and get free shipping. great stuff.
summary: swithching to auto order to save

text: i am on a moderately low carb diet and tried the shirataki rice. if you are expecting anything close to actual rice you will be sorely disappointed. i found these things they taste like little bitty round pellets of fat to be barely palatable. i havent tried the noodles yet but i can say the shirataki rice is not a good substitute for actual rice. i wish it was but its not.

when i want a cleancrispfullbodied tea this is the one.no bitter after taste. only complaint is thatalthough i like the pyramid tea bag shape maybe 1 bag in a box is defective and tea comes out while brewing. otherwiseits the best tasting english breakfast ive tried.

this is a great product but it is now in a new box different from the one shown. 4 of the new boxes burst during shipping because the packaging did not adequately protect its vulnerabilities. 5 boxes had the plastic lids torn off the top but the seal seems intact for now. 3 seem ok. until they fix the terrible packaging of the new soup box dont buy this unless you want to receive a cardboard box full of runny sticky soup and damaged soup boxes. the box that is shown here is similar to hemp milk boxes i bought from amazon that arrived in perfect shape. unfortunately i did not receive the potato soup in boxes like the one shown in the picture here.
summary: terrible packaging of new boxes allows boxes to burst!

text: at first taste a strange orange carbonated drink but with each followup swig the taste seems to get better and better! an allnatural blend of pure fruit juice and sparkling water 70 fruit juice 30 sparkling wateri love that this is a drink thats got a punch of fruit juice and the sparkling water just makes it even more enjoyable. clementine tastes just like fresh oranges so its a good flavor for anytime of day or night. simple stylish packaging great for entertaining or everyday refreshment pairs perfectly with fine food and is a stylish nonalcoholic beverage optionrefridgerating izze does wonders for the cool refreshing taste on your tongue and is a great drink to quench ones taste or partner up with a snack. the 8.4 ounce cans are a perfect size for a quick thirtbuster and very handy and portableonthego. love the design too! made with natural ingredients and fortified with vitamins vitamin c b6 and niacinonly 80 calories a drink so i can drink one after the other! the taste is quite addictive again gets better with each swig! highly recommended! cannot wait to try the other flavors.
my 11 month old twins like the pumpkin banana flavor. its sweeter than i thought it would be but the babies seem to like it. the packaging is convenient and i love that its organic!
purchased both icing and mix at walmart. made cupcakes using applesauce and eggbeaters. they were absolutely great! everyone loved them but being as healthy as possible.

i understand the need for high quality and craftmanship with these tea bags but they are just plain poorly designed. while other companies are making tea bags that dont soak up water ones that drain more easily and otherwise kusmi still has these tea bags that suck up water and drip everywhere. you cannot leave your bag in the cup as the water will seep up the rope and drip all over whatever the tea is on. it is very very annoying.otherwise though anastasia is the best of kusmis tea. and they make amazingly high quality greattasting tea. i am a huge tea snob and i balk at paying so much for a box of tea but it is worth it as it is really fantastic tastewise. i just wish theyd redesign their tea bags!

this stuff is great on rice and beans and on anything made with cheese. i can even make kraft macaroni and cheese bearable with this stuff! its flavorful without being hot and it keeps for a long time.

weve purchased these for a long time and the salt pepper flavoring makes them even more addictive than even normal salted pistachios are...however...quality of this product has slipped they used to guarantee that you wouldnt get an unopened nut in the bag...now they are no better than other bags of pistachio nuts in terms of unsplit nuts that you basically have to toss. also the size of the nuts has gotten smaller in my perception. they used to be noticeably bigger and fatter than any others i was familiar with. now i would say theyre just average. lastly im not so sure purchasing them thru amazon that were getting the freshest bags available...i often sense that even a newlyopened bag is not at the top of its game so to speak. althoug the seasoning does still make them special betcha cant eat just one... the company should renew its commitment to product quality and step up their game.
summary: good but not as good as they used to be...

text: this is the best on the market rinse very well then pan frydice for potato salad add to crockpot meals last 2030 minutes to heat thru.
summary: used for years camping salads fried weggsham

text: after eating one of these chews my dog developed life threatening diaharrea . undigested pieces of these chews were in his waste. i do not reccomend them.
this tea is seriously good. the aromatic flavors have the perfect amount of sweetness. the hint of coconut perfectly complements the hibiscus.

i noticed this when i look everyday to see if amazon has the im healthy brand back in stock. my son is allergic to peanuts so we eat a lot of soynut butter. this brand is canadian i had never heard of it obviously being in the states. i researched their website and contacted the company that manufactures it directly before purchasing this item from amazon. i had wanted to buy samples to try before taking the plunge on 200 containers of soynut butter. they do not have samples available. my daughters new preschool makes the parents responsible for bringing snack to the class every month. so i bought these to pair with sliced apples on my snack day.this is the perfect premeasured size to prevent over eating of the soy butter. great serving size for travel and little people who usually waste most of what is put on a plate anyway. this is very smooth. it is not as sweet as the im healthy brand by far. it has more of a peanut butter feel to it as well i would guess because of less sugar perhaps. but nothing like the unsweetened kinds you can get which i do not like at all! i enjoyed eating it and my son did as well. when ever we get through all 200 of these i will definately purchase again.
summary: great value good taste. small package

text: i have been buying this brand of vanilla for several years at costco and i love it. its very affordable and ive always been happy with the quality. when baking for profit i tend to lean more towards nielsen massey madagascar bourbon vanilla however this is great to keep on hand in a pinch. most people cant tell the difference.
shipping was fast. the texture is great but the flavor tastes like soap. it was inedible and threw it out. i assume chocolate or vanilla might taste better.

there is a vast improvement in both texture and grape flavor once the package is opened and allowed to airdry for 36 hours. initially the first piece i withdrew from a fresh package broke due to the very soft texture. further i could not discern any grape flavor and worse a waxy profile permeated the twist. after 1.5 days the texture improved 300 the aroma at least 100 and i could clearly discern the subtle grape flavor one reviewer cited. the waxy profile was reduced by half its original strength but remains noticeable. i will continue the curing process and reedit this review after a week or two hoping to report the grape flavor has concentrated further while the waxy flavor has diminished. these twists are mildly sweet with 4 grams of sugar per twist.if the grape flavor were much stronger and the waxy flavor eliminated this product would be 5 stars.
summary: waiting on grape flavor to develop further

text: my daughter loves all the annies snacks so this is a great way for us to take them along and have a variety esp. if we are traveling. will order again.

while i like the idea of milos kitchen i found that the ingredients in the product raise some questions about the health risks to my rottie. there are onions and such that could cause harm to my pet so with that said i dont believe i will be purchasing this item again.
summary: milos kitchen beef sausage slices with rice

text: this is the only chai tea ill drink. ive tried lots of others and always come back to celestial seasonings. i cant find it in my local grocery stores so im now buying it by the case here. i only drink decaf beverages so this suits the bill for me. i add my fat free cream and have a great satisfying late evening drink.

i received my lickety stik bacon flavored dog treat from the amazon vine program free in exchange for writing a review.i thought this product was a kind of stick based on the name of it. instead its a flavored liquid in a bottle with a roller ball something like a deodorant applicator.we have a beagle who loves treats and loves to chew. i thought he would like this treat simply because i was giving it to him. he did understand that he had to lick the ball to get the flavor but he wasnt impressed. two sniffs three licks and he was done.i dont think this treat is safe for dogs unless you stand there and hold it for them. any chewing on their part will either separate the roller ball from the end and choke them or their teeth will puncture the container and the liquid will go everywhere. its certainly not a treat you can give them and turn your back.i much prefer treats that they can totally eat and i cant see this rollerball treat being very popular with pet owners.
summary: i think theyre out of ideas for dog treats...

text: this is nutricious i guess but certainly easy to stick in the microwave. the flavor is fine but i think a bit bland and a bit dry. better to add something to it.ill add bits of leftover meat or maybe a little canned chicken. then some sort of sauce ranging from soy to sweet sour or teriyaki. use your imagination but i think youll be happier using this as a starting point.then you have a very nice lunch prepared on a good and easy rice base.
summary: good but needs a bit of help

text: dont purchase this product unless you have plenty of time to wait for its arrival. it has been over a month since i placed my order and i still have not received my shipment nor have i received any communication from nutricity stating a reason for the delay or even that i should expect a delay.
summary: i still havent gotten my shipment

text: so after comparing this to jay robb i can say that this protein is not as good. the taste isnt as good and it doesnt mix that easy. i dont think it is horrible just not that good.one thing i like about the jay robb is that they use hormone free chicken eggs. i sent healty n fit an email asking where they get their eggs from but they didnt reply. it is a little cheaper but i found the jay robb at vitamin shoppe for 20 per 12ozs which isnt bad. i have to say that i dont like the dudes picture on the bottle but thats my only complaint.
wonderful! my son loves these granola bars! he has celiac and we wanted to try something different these were a hit!

i was disappointed with the variety pack and should have ordered the honey roasted or dry roasted macs. the chocolate covered macs have so much chocolate that i could not taste the macs the kona flavored ones were bitter and the onion and garlic ones were too salty. i love the flavor of macadamia nuts and was disappointed that it was overwhelmed by low quality ingredients. definitely not worth the price!

i tried this brand of sugarless maple syrup because i read an article touting that this was the best. i bought it despite its price twice as much as what i bought at the local grocery store because the article said it tastes like real maple syrup. wrong.
summary: over priced and not that good

text: ive been trying lots of crackers and ive been disappointed in most of them. but these are great. theres no gritty aftertaste. thank you!. they are highly seasoned but not too salty. these would be great with a cheese ball or dip.
this is the best coffee we have ever had made for the keurig brewers. the flavor is very full bodied with no bitterness.

i bought these originally to include as a little extra for my handmade mineral makeup samples but i love that i can give them to my kids without feeling as terrible as giving them something made with less natural ingredients. my only complaint was the bag was made up of mostly watermelon so i wouldve like more of a variety but im hoping this next bag around will be more even.

i always come back to this after trying the new flavors. i use my travel mug so i actually use the medium cup selection open the top and reuse the same kcup with a small cup to fill up my mug and it still has lots of flavor. ive shared these with a few friends and got them hooked too great value.
summary: my favorite kcup of all time!

text: i had such high hopes for this mix but it was really disappointing. the main flavor was salt. which made me think that maybe there was some sort of mix up between the salt and the sugar when the batch was made?... i hope it was a mistake. though i will not purchase again.

i purchased these on amazon based on the nutrition information provided. it is a lie. the packaging states 1 serving per package 290 calories 970 mg sodium. thats a lot of sodium!!! the nutrition information on this website states 140 calories and 470 mg sodium for one serving. if that were the actual case i might actually try the soup. now i will never know if the soup actally tastes good or not since it has proved to be a very unhealthy choice. please provide accurate and actual information so your customers can make informed decisions. waste of my time and money. the actual nutrition facts from the side of the carton are calories 210 total fat 1.5g sodium 970mg total carbs 59g dietary fiber 2g sugars 4g protien 11g. as you can see you are consuming about half a days sodium and depending on your diet a lot of carbs with very little nutritional value. had this information been available on amazon i would have purchased something else for my workday lunches.
summary: beware nutrition list is a lie!!!

text: compare to hamburger helper but better without the gluten. this company makes several other varieties tuna chicken stroganoff. all are good quick easy.

i was expecting better. the broth is decent and the beans are pretty good but the vegetables are too soft and overcooked and theres not enough of them. progresso minestrone lowsodium soup is much better but it has egggs and milk which i can no longer eat since im vegan. by the way i contacted amazon via email last week to remove the glutenfree description on this soup. i guess someone fell asleep at customer service because i never got a reply nor has the description been rectified. like i said i expected better.addendum october 19 2012 amazon finally acted on my request to remove the glutenfree description on the soup. the soup is no longer labeled as glutenfree. thank you amazon.

the title for this product should not include meal but snack instead. the combination of salmon and crackers dried edamame dried fruit and chocolate toffee doesnt seem like much of a meal but several snacks put together. regardless that makes for a great lunchsnack while on the go. my kids did some taste testing with me and really enjoyed the edamame we did live in japan though so this was familiar to them dried fruit and nuts the crackers without salmon and of course the chocolate. i was worried the salmon would be too strong but it just had a hint of lime and chili. a knife would have been nice to have to spread the salmon. overall i thought this would make a good snack for the kids and i in between outings or at the park. lots of fiber and a healthier options that a lot of products out there.

first the good it tastes as good as orvilles if you like orville. now the bad eating lady finger is like eating popcorn crumbs. if you are looking for popcorn you can eat without a spoon try something else. the popped corn is only slightly larger than the kernels.
summary: if you like the bottom of the bag

text: i love the back to nature products ive tried. and as i suspected the graham crackers land on that life. with a great graham hint of honey flavor these are terrific as a bed for peanut or almond butter and delicious on their own.however if you war looking for a natural graham cracker for a crust you will need to go by weight as these little guys are smaller than traditional graham crackers. also since they pack real oldfashioned oatmeal simple crushing might not give you the results you want. but a food processor or blender should solve that problem.

i purchased the honey stung smokies and some of the reviews stated that they were mushy i wouldnt go that far but they are softer then most beef sticks but they still have a snap to them. the taste is great even the picky kids liked these smokiesi think we will try some of the other flavors. plus order these again.
ive always loved kraft macaroni and cheese so i had to try this. it tastes just like the normal kind and is super easy to make. it is perfect for one person too.
summary: tastes just like the normal kind!!

text: i have purchased dried pineapple for years but it is sometimes very chewy. this pineapple is softer but still has no sulphur or sugar in it. it is a good snack for all of us but especially for my 2 12 year old grandson who has severe food allergies.

this product is super. my dog tends to wolf her food down and then wonder where it all went. putting a cup of her food in this thing at dinner time makes her work for it.it is very tough and with a dog as hardmouthed and persistent as mine it has to be to last. she hasnt broken any part of it which means its indestructible.im trying to train her to bring it to me when i say wheres your bottle? well see if she catches on.

whats there to say about a fantastic chocolate chip cookie! the only thing that could be improved is if they offered a bushel box of these so you would not run out so fast. hope these dont go the way of the dinosaur!

this product has an appalling taste. it has the texture of cardboard and is otherwise bland and vile.i think if there is no added sugar the freeze dried form of this fruit is not so appealing. its as though all the flavor of the papaya was removed during the drying process.your first feeling when you put it in your mouth is an overwhelming desire to spit it out. its as dry as a potato chip but gathers some moisture in your mouth whereupon the taste hits you dirty sock. yes its like stuffing a sock in your mouth.as an experiment i dropped several chips into my dogs bowl. she wagged her tail eagerly at first presuming she was getting a treat. one sniff however disabused her of that notion and she turned away disgusted. yup its that bad my dog wouldnt eat it!you get all this for 16? no thanks.
summary: should have listened to the bad reviews

text: if you like spicy youll love this way better than the kind you get at the grocery store!it is so warm and delicious! buy it
these escargot are among the best that i and my guests have eaten. i will definitely order again and soon!!!!!!
summary: hit of my feast of the seven fish celebration

text: the dogs love it. i think it is healthier than some of the mainstream brands that my vet tells me to avoid. one of my dogs is very sensitive to dog food and has allergies so far he has had no problems with harmony wet food. i am paying less money online than i would be if i went to the store.

abcs today show recently tested arctic zero chocolate peanut butter along with arctic zero maple vanilla and found that arctic zero vanilla maple had a whopping 46 percent more calories than the label. the chocolate peanut butter an incredible 68 percent more calories. if you do the math 68 more calories than 32 is 63 almost exactly what youd calculate from looking at the protein and carb.they did not unfortunately test this product. caveat emptor is all i can say.you can find the report by googling rossen reports can you believe diet frozen dessert labels?
summary: independent testing suggests caution about those calories

text: very tasty and fresh good oil etal delicious item i have used them in salad right out of the can in a sandwich and in soup lots of ways to prepare them. also very good for you
if you like ok with your diet system spicey snacks these are well done! choose the type of nut you your system enjoy best! then relax!
these organic buckwheat groats are easy to toast and cook. i enjoy them combined with cabbage carrots and onions. they make wonderful salads too and at the price they are a real bargain.
the banana nut bread was much better then i thought. i would have never bought this in he store but trying it has changed my mind.
the package arrived about a week late. however the company was quite responsive and the final product is what we wanted.

i love this cereal but i ordered this pack on amazon and ended up getting 4 boxes of stale honey bunches of oats that expired. youre better off going to the grocery store where cereal doesnt expire for another year to yearandahalf.

i like to get unusual or strange candies often foreign for my nieces and nephews for their birthdays just to try for fun. this was one i thought sounded interesting to try. it literally made me nauseous for quite some time. if youre looking for tiny packets of salt this is the product for you. if its candy you want keep looking.....
impossible to find in the stores these halls plus cherry cough drops are the only thing that gets me through the earlyspring birch tree pollen time.
a little goes a long way but enclosed dropper makes it really easy to control the amount used. ive only used this in my coffee but im looking forward to trying it in a few recipes.

this product is hard to find in my area so even though i didnt need an entire case i purchased them and handed some out to other family members over thanksgiving. i love using the corn flake crumbs for anything that needs breading as it has a nice flavor even without spices and makes food extra crispy with just a very small amount of olive oil in the pan! great on fish twice baked ravioli and chicken to name a few. i have also used the crumbs in yogurt and on salads for a little extra crunch. highly recommended!

these were on one of the amazon friday sales and i decided to give them a try. theyre tangy and sweet i quite like them. the 3 flavors all have a core taste to them though which makes sense if you read the ingredients. the core of this product is apples in all 3 cases... and its there in every bite. fortunately i like apples but if youre looking for variety in flavor youll be disappointed here.

my family has eaten these beans and the santa fe black beans also for many years. the quality is consistently very high. surprisingly they taste every bit as good as the canned varieties which are not as healthy. highly recommended.
my dogs go crazy for these lamb chips they tend to be fussy about snacks but these are a real hit and i love the fact that they are pure protein great for dogs with a weight problem.
i really liked the pepper one! difrent from any other vegi jerky i have had! i liked it tho! jus a bit dry but thats the way real jerky is i guess wouldnt know since i been a vegi my whole life!!
bought these for my daughter who is in college she and her roommates love them! very convenient packaging well worth the extra money.

this cereal is very hard to find! glad that i was able to order it on amazon.com. it arrived in excellent condition and i am enjoying it every morning. if you want a cereal that is tasty and holds up well in milkyou really should try this cereal. no soggy flakes here!

oatmeal is good for you but i have always hated the taste. the maple brown sugar flavor of quaker instant oatmeal has always been my favorite way to eat it. i started with the regular version then moved to the lower sugar option and have finally settled on the weight control variety. the weight control tastes great and smells like waffles.one reviewer of this product was disappointed by the fact that when he compared the weight control version to the regular quaker instant oatmeal he realized that weight control has the same number of calories 160 and more fat 3g instead of 1g but you need to analyze the products as a whole. there may be more fat in the weight control but if you look at the other components of the product youll see that weight control has fewer calories coming from carbohydrates 29g instead of 33g but it has two times more dietary fiber 6g instead of 3g and a lot less sugar 1g instead of 13g!. more dietary fiber and less sugar is what you should really be looking for in your carbs anyway. weight control also has almost twice as much protein as regular 7g instead of 4g.there is more to think about with your food than how much fat it contains. quaker instant oatmeal weight control fit my familys needs but you should make sure you really look at the different products nutritional information. you can compare quakers products on their website ....

text: not sure what happened here since usually crystal light puts out wonderfully refreshing and tasty powdered drinks. they missed the mark totally here. i eagerly served up a giant pitcher of this but immediately noticed that the powder smelled medicinal as i mixed. after pouring over ice i had high hopes the flavor would not disappoint. i was wrong. my guests all had the same instant reaction ugh! this tastes just like medicine! i ditched the entire box. it reminded me of a bad flavored alka seltzer or even worse a frozen drink that sat out in the sun too long and lost all its flavor and zest. the artificial green coloring of the margarita was a turn off too just too fake. the only positive thing i can say is that there was no funny aftertaste at all like is often the case with some diet drinks. but too bad the actual taste was so awful!

text: i am usually careful about checking the calories before i order because im on a calorierestricted diet. i looked at the nutritional information and i dont believe that i read it wrong 280 calories. it now says each serving is 0.5 bowl. im not going to bet money it wasnt there before but ive looked at a million nutritional printouts so i dont think so. in any case it arrives and now i realize its 600 calories per bowl. about 13 the calorie requirement of a mediumsized woman per day. much more than a caramel mocha with whipped cream at mcdonalds. so if i want to eat them it will be few and far between. they are good. i like the texture of the noodles. but for those calories i can get a hamburger and large fries.if the 0.5 bowl equal to one serving was there before i apologize. hummmmm.

this is a fast easy tasty curry fix. its may be a little spicy for some people. id rate it 2.5 stars on a four star hotness scale.i like it best made with boneless chicken thighs but chicken breaststenders are ok if a bit more dry. cut the chicken into 12 inch pieces and throw it in the pot with the curry mixture. youll have 34 tasty meals in about twenty minutes. i like to serve it over rice but naan is fine. leftovers are good too.personally id rate it 412 stars but that wasnt an option. i eat this 34 times a month.their other dishes are nice too but this is my favorite.

overall this is an ingenious device allowing you to cook then puree your babys food all with a single reasonably compact device. as far as it goes it works well but there are a couple of issues as follows1. there is no audible indicator when a cooking cycle is done. there is a light that goes out but thats it so if youre not in there watching it or checking it youll never know when its done.2. building on 1 if you leave the machine with the switch in the cooking position and fail to turn it off after some time 30 minutes an hour were not sure it will spontaneously start the cooking cycle all over again. weve forgotten about it overnight and woken up to a warm device filled with greatly overcooked food.3. there is no timer to allow you to judge when the cooking cycle might finish so its all guesswork until you start to get an instinct for it. this compounds issues 1 and 2.4. there is no way to store all the pieces together when not in use. there is a cooking basket that fits inside the cooking cup and when its in there then you cant also put the blending lid in the stack because its one or the other. also there is no place to store the spoonstick that is used to retrieve the hot basket out of the cooking cup. so when its all clean you have at least two random pieces floating around that have to be tracked and stored separately. a couple of little clips or indentations or something to hold these pieces would make it a lot more convenient.we really wish that they would update the device to address the above issues. we use it on an almost daily basis and it does a great job at cooking and pureeing the food as long as you watch it like a hawk and have nearby storage for the loose pieces but it could use some polish to make it a really efficient device.
summary: so very close but not quite there

until i saw read about 9.5 ph drinking water i didnt know that i needed it. ive read the information provided by the manufacturer and tried a 1.5 liter bottle and still am not convinced that 9.5 ph is a must have. i cant say that the essentia is better than my goto filtered water but i also cant say that my goto filtered water is better either. however if you are a bottled water drinker anyway essentia may be a product for you to try.i drank 12 of the bottle after 2 separate workouts. after the first workout i drank filtered water still felt thirsty. i decided to try the essentia it did quench my thirst. after the second workout i just drank the last of the essentia it seemed to quench my thirst.tastewise i cannot tell any difference between essentia and filtered water. i detected no metallic taste.the essentia seemed to fill my mouth a little more but with sampling only 1 bottle i may have just been my imagination.if you are a bottled water drinker essentia is a product to try to see if it works for you. if you are a filtered water drinker your experience may be that your filtered water is just fine.
summary: seems to provide good hydration after a workout. still a little skeptical but worth trying if you are a bottled water drinker.

i loooove peanut better and this ersatz butter tastes pretty good to me and has 0 cholesterol. nevertheless because of its high calorie count and high price i can stretch the rating to only 3 stars. yes the taste is good but in order to get a 2 tablespoon serving you need at least 6 tablespoons of the powder mixed with 3 tablespoons of water. otherwise 2 tablespoons of the powder mixed with 1 of water will yield only about 1.5 teaspoons of spreadable peanut butter barely enough to coat half a slice of bread. and so...one serving 2 tablespoonsful of the mixture ends up being 135 caloriesnot 45 calories which is the count for 2 tablespoons of the powder. if youre counting calories and pennies you might as well get the regular peanut butter for less than half the price of the dry stuff.
summary: misleading calorie countlots more than 45 calories per serving!!!
