i have ordered this tuna on two different occasions. the quality is good like bigname brands such as starkist or chicken of the sea but the 24 pack is a little more convenient if you use a lot. i bought my tuna as a weightloss device. this tuna fish is high in protein but amazingly low in fat. the only concern is that a highfish diet these days introduces the risk of mercury exposure. still its a great way to supplement your diet with cost effective and healthy seafood. super healthy with brown unbleached rice.

the product was good but the value wasnt for the same price i could have purchased the 13 oz bag of these at walmart.and they would have been closer. i was hoping that i could find the 365 bag of pep o minton line since they were in a store for a short while. i also wasnt made aware of any other method of shipping. i think that the shipping could have been cheaper i wont be ordering this in the future. overall this was not agood value for my money.

if you like black licorice and is there really any other kind and chocolate you will love these. its a bit of heaven! ive been losing weight this past year 118 pounds worth but for christmas i will treat myself to one of these. they are that good that you can look forward with anticipation for a whole year just to savor one. mmmmmmmmmm.....
i would like to order this but cant find what size each jar is? is each jar the 36 oz size like the single basmati rice jar?

my wife and i are granola bar eaters. for a long time we ate the fiber one brand but recently switched over to the kind brand.first we originally thought this product was too expensive despite it looking and reading better than other products but recently found them on amazon.com for a reasonable price using subscribe and save and decided to give them a try.we find the kind minis are great for a midday snack and fulfill our granola bar needs. while they are infact small in appearance they seem to pack quite the energetic punch. the variety pack is great for those who might get sick of the sameoldroutine.i hope you found this review helpful.
summary: great snack great price great variety.

text: given a choice between this version and the dark chocolate version well chocolate beats just about everything. but for the interested muncher with concerns about urinary tract health cranberry has to be appealing and i love the walnuts so yeah thumbs up!
summary: cranberry not my favorite but this works!

text: i love this stuff. i used to get it at my local kroger but it disappeared from the shelves one week and never came back. i was so happy to find it on amazon. i use raspberry balsamic vinegar with it. heaven!

i bought these for my coworkers but i wasnt a huge fan of the flavor kind of chalky not like their cheaper more colorful rainbow candy cane counterparts.. most of them went to waste. these are best suited to kids with undiscerning palates they will appreciate the colors and the sweettarts name.

this looks like a good for you product what with the honey and green tea and acai and all but i was disappointed to find sucralose artificial sweetener on the ingredients list. i love the convenience of having a tube of powder to pour into my water bottle and shake... and i did like the taste but i probably wont be buying more because of the sucralose.
this is my favorite coffee to brew on a daily basis. very hard to find the large decafs in the store now. it is smooth and has a great flavor. we drink a pot every morning.
summary: it is definitely good to the last drop

text: my wife loves this tea and i was very happy to find it cheaper here on amazon. i was able to buy it in bulk and save compared to the store price.

just bought a 4 pack last week and was surprised to find that theres no chocolate as an ingredient at all in this beverage. the title seems to be misleading as it says ghiradelli chocolate hot beverage mix.

here is a secret recipe that you will not find in any fancy soup book nor on the food channel. add anything to v8 and you will find that you have a yummy soup. ham chicken potatos noodles rice pack it in. great for that campfire caserole. make sure that its all cooked before hand. warm it up. yumm yumm.no this does not compare to all those wonderful french polish jewish tai soups. and my wife could cook circles around this v8 concotion. but if you have leftovers or its finals time at school. this is now your secret soup.study hard!
i tried this product i didnt like it it was to salty. anyone who has high blood pressure should use with caution.

the title header for this item is confusing it says 2 boxes 20 cakes. what you are getting is a total of 20 individually wrapped twinkies. these are the same 10 pack boxes you can buy at any grocery store across the u.s. in the detailed description of the item it does say 2 boxes of 10 but you have to look hard for it amongst all the other information on a typical amazon page. i thought i was getting 40 cakes for the listed price which would have been a good deal but i might as well have just gone to the store and bought these cheaper and not paid shipping.
summary: twinkies tasted great but are overpriced

text: from the back of the bag2.5 servings per 2.5oz bagper serving150 calories9g of fat375 calories22.5g of fat per bagcompare to a bare product... a 2.6 oz bag from bare has 174 calories and no fat.i dont get it. you might as well eat potato chips. and they taste greasy. if youre looking for an apple flavored potato chip try these. otherwise avoid the entire brand.
summary: they are fried you might as well eat potato chips

text: the bully stick wrapped around the bone is probably a standard size which for people who dont know bully sticks as well as i wish i didnt is less than 1 inch thick but usually bigger than 12 inch. my dog is a heavy chewer she has not met a bully a bone a pen a tissue a piece of wood she doesnt like to chew. i think that it takes her a little longer to get through this bully stick than a normal straight 12 stick because it is more of a puzzle. the bone adds a little bit of a challenge.she doesnt spend a lot of time chewing on the bone. i think it must be frustrating because she cant get anywhere. instead of throwing it out i stuff it with peanut butter and a little kibble and put it in the freezer. i think of it as a bone kong even though that sounds gross. anyway i give it to her as a treat and she loves to dig for the peanut butter.the bully bone is approx. 3.5 long and 1.5 wide at its widest point. my dog is a 50lb pittie mix and she chews on it without a danger of swallowing it. if i had a bigger dog i might steer clear of this treat. for small and mediumsized dogs this 3 treat is worth it!

i really wanted to like these but the title is so misleading. megafudge chewy gooey?they taste good. theyre nice soft chocolaty but theyre not gooey.and if they are mega fudge chewy gooey they should be gooey right? but they werent.major disappointment

the cereal is tasty although it wouldve been better if it were actual graham crakers covered in chocolate. its more a mixed nugget made to look like graham crackers. if it were more like a golden grahams type of cereal it would be better.

we know this is a good product because weve been buying it for years in ct. while in fl weve been unable to find these rice cakes in any of the local stores so we ordered an entire case from amazon.com. although the price was all right the packaging was insufficient and each of the packets that we opened was filled with broken pieces of the rice cakes. its a shame to waste a good item this way and i wouldnt order this or similar food items online again.

i am no stranger to pamelas products and find this one to be extremely good. everyone likes the texture and the pancakes are very light. in addition you can use this product as a baking mix to create many wonderful dishes suitable for people with celiac disease as well as those who dont have celiac.

every year my daughters and i make hundreds possibly thousands of christmas cookies. we make several batches of kolachky cookies with apricot and raspberry filling. my father who is 87 years old loves blueberry. so we went in search of blueberry filling. it is not available in chicago. we searched everywhere. our grocery store even tried to order it. our results were disappointing. so based on a tip i checked out amazon. we were able to order it by the case. i have not opened the case yet...its not time for cookies yet. however i expect the filling to have the same fresh bright taste that other solo fillings have. thank you amazon.

i have been drinking this tea for over 6 years now. i have tried many other types of tea and brands but nothing comes close to bigelow french vanilla! its sweet and strong enough you can taste the vanilla in it but it is still a good black tea. the decafe version is also great!
this is a far overpriced ripoff! these full bottles were sold at walmart for 99 cents each back at christmas time 2011.

we have a picky eater. initially we tried the cheapy route with a few off the shelf grocery store dog foods with those he wouldnt eat for a day or two before getting too hungry to avoid it. then we went with blue buffalo wliderness because of positive reviews and a recommendation from a dog trainer. he mostly liked it except for the dark black bits i think the antioxidants in the food. they kind of looked like dried blueberries. so he would pick through his food spitting those out on the floor and making a mess.this dog food he really likes. so much so that we actually have to pay attention to how much he eats the other foods he has tried we could just fill up the bowl every so often and he ate whenever.we are on our second bag of food 8 weeks into feeding go! and have no complaints.
summary: he likes it. he really likes it.

text: first of all i did not pay attention when ordering. i thought i was buying coffee beans and got ground coffee. my mistake.second of all i did not properly view the item. no where on the package is there any seals for organic or bird friendly or rain forest alliance of which is really important to me. bad me.third of all i have been using the ground coffee and i would rate it ok. nothing special and takes a lot of coffee to make it a robust cup of coffee.so i am not impressed with this product and would not order it again. dissapointed to say the least.

this is my favorite yogi tea so far. ive tried two of the detoxes and the relaxation one. ive also tried other ginger teas. but i always come back to yogi ginger. twinnings has a good one too but i can never find it.i love this tea. its gingery spicy and sweet with a hint of other complementary herbs. this tea is so relaxing and soothes my stomach after notsogreat menu choices. i love ginger so i like to let it steep for a long time with hot hot water to get it extra spicy. it can also be made for very light and delicate flavor if that is what you like. just adjust the steeping time.ginger is good for the body but i dont always have time to buy and boil fresh ginger to make myself tea that way. and honestly ill only take time to do that when im sick. also i doubt anyone wants to bring a bag of fresh ginger root to work to make tea at the office. so this tea is perfect. it has great flavoryou can really taste the ginger. its totally portable so it nice way to get my ginger any time any where.try it. if youre not sure whether youll like it or not try steeping it for only a short while and gradually amping it up until you decide how intense you like to take your ginger tea.
i bought this because i loved the pongal made by mtr. the sambar rice didnt taste like the sambar that im used to. i wouldnt recommend this product.
summary: does not taste like the real thing

text: tried because this was much cheaper than an original kcup. comes in a plastic airtight bag but once you open it you have to put it in a ziploc. this coffee was stronger than i like but ill try another flavor. the pod design is pretty cool.
i love crepes we tried buckwheat flour which is good too but they dont taste nearly as good as crepes made out of this flour mix.

tvp has the consistency of meat but has an alien taste. i knew this before i purchased this item but i bought it anyway because its high in protien and fat free. whoever said the broth tastes good is obviously a vegeterian who has forgotten what real chicken tastes like.ive used this in various soups and in moderation its tolerable. i wouldnt serve this to anybody unless i asked them first. tvp is a highly processed product which is far from natural. im only eating this to loose a few pounds while dieting. i wouldnt consider making this part of my regular menu.
summary: consistency of chicken but not the taste

text: my puggle can devour most bones in minutes. these last a long time. i love this brand and it is the only one that i will buy for my dog.

it was very disappointing when these were received as the product was not as described. it clearly stated 3.5000 pounds of cough drops but after delivery it consisted of the same 12 bags.the net result was a higher price for the same amount of cough drops.

so im a big fan of rock star energy drinks . . .well . .let me specify . .im a big fan of the original rock star energy drink citrusflavored. why? because it pumps me up and it tastes wonderful. this doubleenergy crud may pump me up even more which is not exactly the best thing when im just about to go to classbut it tastes awful . .it tastes like that horrible cough medicine that was given to you as a kid. ... yes . . . its that bad . . .sounless you really need the energy id suggest sticking to the original . . .
makes a reasonably good cup of coffee.lacks the smoothness of some brands but those who like a strong brew may like this

if you like dark chocolate cordial cherries that doent come from the drug store you will adore these delicious morsels. take a step up in the gourmet world of candies and buy these. i treat myself to one of these jewels now and then trying to make my supply last as long as i can. treat yourself! you have been good...right?
summary: yum yum dark chocolate and cordial cherry

text: i first discovered somersaults a couple weeks ago and they were quite good. not only did they taste exceptional sea salt and salt and pepper varieties but the nutritional content was excellent quite in contrast to most snacks. as such i bought a third variety and this one was the dutch cocoa. alas i just dont care for these at all. the first two tasted like a very interesting salty and nutty snacks. these tasted like stale cookies. okay some people might like them but im not one of those. id still say that theyre good in their nutritional value but i dont care for the taste on this variety. im going to have trouble finishing the bag.gary peterson
summary: good nutritional value but taste like stale cookies.

text: my dogs have enjoyed lean treats since they were puppies. they love the treats. the treats arte healthy and as the name implies have little fat in them. i highly recommend the treats for any dog. the vendor was also very prompt in sending the item. the price is also quite reasonable compared to purchasing them at the vets office.

the full strength taste of this gingerlemon drink is too strong for my taste but diluting it by using half as much of the powder just means it makes twice as many servings. it would be great for a queasy stomach these days im using it to mitigate my hayfever induced congestion and itchy throat.
summary: strong ginger taste served warm it soothes some hayfever symptoms

text: its probably what low acid coffee should be but i cant stand the smell and the taste isnt any better.
summary: smells awful and doesnt taste much better.

text: i like this but it tastes more like chocolate milk than coffee. the coffee flavor is bland and weak considering this is supposed to be an italian espressostyle coffee drink as the can says. this tastes better not overly sweet than the starbucks drinks available at grocery stores and the can is lighter to carry along in my purse. very convenient.
summary: chocolate flavor overrides the coffee flavor

text: i have had the trio bars before and loved them. but these bars were very disappointing. they were very stale. so sad because in the past ordering from another company these bars were such a treat!

ok i ate some of this stuff before the last 10 miles ofan 87 mile ride. i dont know if this gel is the reasonor not but my legs quit feeling very tired and i pulledmy two riding partners the last 10 miles at 1823 mphagainst a mild headwind. several others who were behind mefell off. we ended up with a 20mph average.i like the flavor too. i think i responded well to thecaffeine!

when i received the package about 1 week today opened the package and saw 6 pack of jans all natural juice 33.8 oz each container. there was one container that has very little leak because the box was little too big that caused the juice move too much. i tried the taste of the juice was pretty good good but i was very disappointed with the expiration date. it was overdue september 22 2012. imagine that i ordered the juice on september 18th 2012 and received on september 25 2012 while someone packed overdue expiration date september 22 2012. it doesnt make any sense and all business is want is money!! they might not care about customers orders. i really have no idea why they did it. i have the right to give 1 out of 5 star for that kind of reason! i am a long time amazon member. wake up!!
impossible den trouver en france cet assaisonnement pour grillade a un got incomparable.je recommande aux amoureux du barbecue... et de la boone cuisine.
summary: la meilleure des pices pour grillades.

text: product arrived promptly was packed very well and arrived in great condition. i absolutely love this stuff!

if you have already acquired a taste for grapenuts then disregard this post. if you have never eaten them... you may want to start small before committing to purchasing a wholesale bundle of this cereal. my own fault for not doing so i bought the 4 pack of 21oz. cereal. a small handfull tasted tolerable out of the box but a bowl full with milk tasted like burned acorns to me yes ive eaten burnt acorns.pros plenty of fiber and very fillingcons nasty taste unless you already like this stuff in which case youre not reading the reviews.

ive been buying these for nearly 5 years and this is the fiirst time that my son has refused to eat them. they are darker green than usual which was not a problem but the texture was chewier and the flavor wasnt as good. this is a problem since its the only vegetable my son eats and he has severe feeding issues. the taste texture were so different he was gagging. not pleased with the change.
summary: flavor texture not good in this batch

text: cant say anything other than this is a pretty decent price and they do show up fresh not sure i would order them in the summer because im sure they will get hot in the delivery truck but my only complaint is that the bag is a bit too small it doesnt hold enough. xd
i love this stuff. lots of flavor smells like real food. of course it would be healthier to airpop my own and throw out the microwave but for a busy life you cant get a better snack than this.

my 11 month son likes these and we purchased them for him. note that as other reviewers have stated they are very small what do you want for 110 calories? and as such intended for young children this would do nothing for my appetite but they are perfect for the under5 set as a snack. i always sample everything i give my son and i thought these were pretty good. if your kids do not have a preexisting sweet tooth they will probably like these. i thought they would have the consistency of a nutrigrain bar but they are a little more dry than that as a result they create more crumbs than i had anticipated but im more than willing to live with it based on the fact that they are organic do not want to feed my son nutrigrain bars too sweet and not organic!. the pb is very thin and so there is little danger of choking.aside from the crumbs the only real drawback for me is that they are not fortified no iron zinc little to no vitamins etc. i do not think it would cost the company much money to add these ingredients i thought it was sort of standard practice to fortify childrens cerealgrain products so im not sure why the company decided not to.
summary: good option wish they were fortified

text: i sent this as a sympathy gift for my bosses wife when her mother passed away... she absolutely loved it.. it was something to make her feel good while mourning instead of filling her house with flowers and plants that die. a great price for a nicely thoughtout group of items.

the sea salt and pepper cashews from emerald were okay. they werent as delicious as the almonds i reviewed the last time around. i felt that thesalt and black pepper were just too overpowering for my palate. if they toned down the seasoning then you might have something. thats my only complaint with the product otherwise they were good. the cashews were nice and fresh and i love the sea salt flavor.if only they would ease up on the salt and pepper. i would mildly recommend this product.
summary: too salty and peppery for my taste

text: i bought a box of these on impulse at my local grocery store and they sat in the pantry until the day came that i needed a side dish that wouldnt take much time to prepare. my family loved them! im sure they are not as good as the real thing having never actually mashed sweet potatoes but for a quick side we found them to be yummy and nicely seasoned.
i usually love kettle chips and love salt vinegar but these chips were way too vinegary for me! they do have the typical kettle chip crunch but are too aggressively flavored for my taste.

these arrived relatively quick considering they were shipped from hawaii to wv via priority mail however they have obviously not been placed in the coolest part of the shipment as they had some serious melting happen apparently in transit. i gave these a 3 star rating because they did not have as good a quality of chocolate as i am used to having with macadamia nuts hersheys chocolate would have been better but not good enough to make me happy

i have been eating this bread as a last resort? i thought i had tried every gluten free bread out there and this was the best of the worst. well my mistake as of today i will be buying my bread from denver colrado. udis has bread that doesnt need toasting or microwaving you can eat it right from the package....
this is by far the best jamaican jerk seasoning available. ive been using it for years and havent found anything else that comes close to providing authentic jerk flavor. highly recommended.

i think that this must be a relatively new formulation of these cookies because i remember trying them maybe a different brand but i could have sworn they were from kinnikinnick and finding that they were so hard that you could practically break your teeth on them!fortunately though i decided to pick up some today and see if my daughter likes them. well it turns out that these are absolutely great! theyre very much like original oreos. im so happy and my daughter who is also gf was happy to be able to come home tonight and dip cookies in milk just like the commercials. when i gave her one she said these are like the ones on tv. for me? are they gluten free? yay! shes three and was very happy to have a fun treat. she asked if id send one to school with her in her lunch so she can eat what the other kids are eating.pick these up for sure. you wont be disappointed.
summary: yay! a gf cookie that doesnt taste like a gf cookie!

text: first of all everyone should be warned... these peaches are seriously ugly! they are a dark brown and a little scary to try. but i read the other review and decided to give it a try. they are so chewy that i could not bite off a piece. they have to be torn off with your teeth. then there is the flavor or more accurately the lack of flavor. i guess with a good imagination they might be said to taste like peaches but they are pretty much tasteless. at 151 calories a serving why bother? now i realize there is a terrible aftertaste! whoa these are bad!

to make them really good.. add some extras.. cherry tomatos...mushrooms... start another skewer and you will really get something special out of the starter ka bob. you can add just about anything. slices of apples and pears. they thaw out on the counter in about 2 or 3 hours. great over uncle bens 90 second rice packets.

my father in law is a health nut who carries protein bars that are truly all health. they taste like tar. i have protein bars by kellogg which are full of sugar and taste great but they are as close to health food as a typical chocolate cake is. these are great because they are 80 of the way toward the healthy bars and they have 80 of the taste that the unhealthy ones do. the best of both worlds. i gave 4 stars because i have tried bars like these which have the same health and even better taste but since those are a lot more money im not complaining.
this money tree is so small it was funny thought it was a joke. definitely another bad purchase on my behalf totally not worth the money!!!

i was excited to receive this item because i eat healthy and i love blueberries. i have to say this bag didnt last long. i opened it up just to try it at first snack for awhile while watching tv. half a bag later i had to make myself put it away. the next day i tried it on top of vanilla yogurt with a little honey and it was great. if youre looking for a good versatile healthy snack give it a try. my only complaintswhich other reviewers have also notedis that there arent enough blueberries and the clusters arent quite as large as pictured which is probably the old settling during shipping issue. all in all i really enjoyed it and will try it again.

this coffee supposedly is premium it tastes wateryvery thin. not good at all. maybe old??not sure it was a waste and im using it line the bottom of my sitting shoes and trash cans and rainedon luggage to absorb the smells. so i used it but not to drink. do not buy.
summary: weak coffee not good for a premium product and price

text: organic whole wheat shells that cook up into little boats to capture your rich sauce delicious. please continue to stock delallo organic whole wheat pastas.

i enjoy chai tea very much and my partner drinks only tea no coffee. so when we purchased our keurig we wanted to try several varieties of chai to find the perfect one. i shopped on amazon and bought several types with reviews cost recognizable brand and speed of shipping being accounting factors in that order.pros quick delivery the description is accurate and you get exactly what is advertised known brand fresh the price is moderatecons i mention price here again because it is cheaper in other forms tea bagsi prefer a non milk based chai and so this was the ideal for me. i added sugar some days and drank it plain others and both were satsifying. my partner and i both enjoyed it above all the other flavors and i will reccomend and share with friends and family. i will continue to shop and attempt to find a better price but would pay this again because it is worth it.

awesome product! try the campbells healthy request chedder cheese soup w the miracle noodles rice noodles instead of using the regular rice suggested on the recipe on the back of the can. the recipe is for chipolte chicken and rice. we follow the recipe wa few changes saute onion and bell peppers we use frozen ones if were in a hurry for a quick meal along with either tysons frozen precooked and grilled chicken frajita or 1 lb ground turkey. add 2 tbs. tomato paste 1 can whole black beans w a pinch or two of salt and several shakes to taste of any mediterranean or morrocan spice blend. we use morrocan twist spice rub or use a mediterranean spice mix we made at home from a recipe we found online. add 3 bags miracle noodles rinsed and heated in a pan to dry them out a bit and 2 cans of the campbells healthy request chedder cheese soup and youve got a delicious winner that is a satisfyingdelicious soul food easily kept in the fridge for 5 days and heated in the microwave as needed. guilt free! yum. hope you enjoy!
summary: recipe for using rice miracle noodles

text: the taste of the coffee is fine. the problem is that the melitta pods do not fit in a senseo machine. even though they are advertised to do so the pods are too thick. not even close to fitting......way too thick. finally had to use them in a regular coffee maker and after using a senseo thats no fun at all.
this horchata mix tastes nothing like horchata. there are better alternatives if you want horchata.

although they call it a dipping mustard its much more than that. great spread on ham or turkey sandwiches and perhaps other things i havent thought of yet. the taste is sublime and if youre not careful youll find yourself eating spoonfuls right out of the jar!

it says light on sodium but it should say light on flavor. grind up some tree bark soak it in water and you have this this lentil couscous. i put some of this in my dogs bowl to see what he thought of it after i forced three spoonfuls down. i swear to god my jack russell dry heaved. he walked away with half of the spoonful still in the bowl and he eats everything. if anything this purchase was worth it just to see my dog do that. i will never forget the look he game me that said oh man what did you just give me?!. utterly hilarious. the five left from the package are in the garbage.

its really nice not having to run to the grocery store and having sugar for my coffee delivered to my door but the price is a little exorbitant and a pound really isnt as much as it sounds like. im a 24year old bachelor so i dont think these things through like i should. if you were as idiotic as me this is to let you know that. you can buy sugar about 3 times cheaper at any grocery store. i realize my own stupidity led to this purchase but thats why im trying to clue you in by the way the cardboard container is very poorly designed. if youre determined to experience the convenience of having sugar delivered to your door the purchase the five pound bag for a few dollars more here

this bbq pork jerky by oberto is simply incredible! we cant keep it in the house for over a day. our doggy will cast aside her beggin strips in preference and protest...she gets really serious about her snacks. the pork slices have a scrumptious sweet and hot barbeque flavor and theyre not as tough as beef jerky. my only beef with the pork is a common one...not enough there. this stuff comes in at about a buck and a half an ounce...approximately twentyfour bucks per pound. cmon jerky makers cut us some slack and a bit more meat if ya please!

quaker oatmeal squares cereal is a nice alternative to the typical flake cereal. the squares stay generally crunchy and tasty covered by milk. very filling and just sweet enough though i still like to add extra sugar. quaker had a toasted oatmeal cereal that i liked better but stopped making it several years ago. this is a nice alternative.

i am so upset i ever gave my baby this poison.read for yourself. just google babys only arsenic and read the study done by dartmouth university.obviously the researchers did not name babys only formula in fear of a lawsuit. nevertheless you can put 1 and 1 together and figure out the only formula on the market that uses organic brown rice syrup.i feel sick right now.
summary: inorganic arsenic detected exceeds 20x that of other formula

text: i ordered this product to use as a nondairy no casein no soy substitute for coffee creamer after discovering i have some food allergies. i was pretty bummed having to give up my creamer and plain or flavored rice milk was just not rich enough. i use two teaspoons of this in my morning tea and it adds a nice rich flavor with a bit of sweetness. i also tried to make my own rice milk drink according to the directions but did not really like the flavor or texture a bit watery and kind of gummy. i did not bother experimenting with adding different amounts of the powder to try to get a product i liked because i have a rice milk beverage that i am happy with already.
summary: makes a good substitute for coffee creamer

text: i fell in love with this green tea has a unique flavor. its light like a green tea should be and has a slight fruity flavor. best green tea ive had yet.

this pump does not really fit the 64oz. ghirardelli bottle...it is too long for the bottle. its possible to push it down and twist it on but the end of the tube is laying against the bottle it doesnt go straight down. it works for what it needs to do but i wish it really fit the bottle.
the sugar tastes like sugar and melts well. i sense no insulin spike at all when i use it in my daily latenight hot chocolate. excellent stuff. reasonably priced. highly recommend it.
this is a lot of cinnamon. but thats ok as ive shared it with family. everyone is happy with its taste.
for a licorice addict this will do but it isnt any better than twizzlers and might be worse.
good tasting popcorn and plenty for one person just watch the microwave because it will burn quickly. otherwise a good price and good flavor.
summary: good popcorn but watch the microwave.

text: no one not even my children liked these. they were hard and very very chewy and lacked flavor. there were only 4 in the package not eight like we were expecting which was fine with me because i would have just thrown them away anyways. just a heads up if you needed eight for something. the only positive was that they looked cute.
im making perfect vietnamese style coffee with no complaints! do not screw the middle section down just place it on top. it took me maybe 3 tries to get it just right but it works perfectly.

my dogs have preferred these for years over the other one and need the small size. the local store that had them changed to the medium awhile back and i put in a request for the small again. since this was not done i looked and found them here. actually a little less expensive as well.the only complaint that i have which i think is not minor is that all of the boxes were taped together. i had hoped to be able to share a few boxes but they looked so damaged after i got the tape off that it is really not possible.great shipping great product poor packaging!

text: its lifesavers. its wintergreen. what more can i say?? everyone likes them!

these are very good but in the very warm weather the filling can go soft.so i keep mine in the freezer. try and keep them sealed to avoid moisture all i do is fold the silver packet over and they are really good. thereis not enough to them to taste cold but they are crisper. i only keepthe packet i have open in the freezer. see what you think.
summary: to make good even better keep them in the freezer!

text: i do have to say that i have a vitamix too. so i am able to blend my almondscoconut really well before pouring it into the nut milk bag. it takes awhile to squeeze all the milk through 68 minutes but it is worth it when it is done! the only thing is there is no instruction sheet that comes with the bag or at least to my knowledge maybe i unknowingly tossed it?. so search online for a recipe for nut milks.

text: there are alot of walnut sellers on amazon so it was difficult to narrow them down. i finally settled on now foods walnuts and couldnt be happier. the nuts arrived wellpacked and seem to be very fresh. i froze 2 of the 3 bags i received and plan to order more as soon as i open my 3rd bag to ensure that i dont run out.definitely a 5star item. and as always amazon service is very good too.

in short this was nicely packaged carbonated apple juice. even thought the package says black cherry the beverage reminded me of my childhood and the boxed apple juice drinks i would take to school...except that it was carbonate and in a can. the drink was not bad and i may even find myself choosing it at times over soda but not for the cost of almost a dollar per 8 ounce can.there is nothing spectacular about this drink. if you like carbonated apple juice and would be willing to pay the price to carry it around in a nicelooking can this is the product for you. for the rest of you probably pass.

i was extremely disappointed when these came. as others mentioned the price was outrageous but my husband likes the cherries and we didnt have blueberries locally. when they arrived for 1 each they were dry and lacked flavor. i have enjoyed many varieties of chocolate fruits some better than others but i can honestly say these were the worst! dont waste your money.
summary: too little for the price and poor quality

text: jet fuel is the best coffee hands down. no bitter bad after taste just smooth delicious bold flavor in an amazing cup of coffee. taste great regardless of brew size. never want to run out of this stuff it is that goo!

i have become a bit of a french roast snob tasting as many as i can in search of the one which pleases my palate best. so far the bean coffee company le bean coffee dark french roast organic whole bean 16ounce bags pack of 2 is that very best one.i prefer organically grown coffee and this is 100 organically grown arabica beans. the fresh flavor has great depth and is rich and smooth. the beans are beautiful dark and glistening! the aroma is heavenly. the beans are low acid and antioxidant rich. this is truly a coffee of exceptional quality!the bean coffee company le bean coffee dark french roast organic whole bean 16ounce bags pack of 2 is also an exceptional value at amazon. the price per pound with amazons subscribe and save program is better than the price per pound of organic french roast coffees i have purchased elsewhere and the quality of this coffee is much better.im very happy to have found this wonderful organic french roast coffee!
summary: an organically grown coffee of exceptional quality and value

text: bbq very tasty.original not that tasty.cheddar is okay and the sweet potato if you can find it is light on flavor but good none the less.go with bbq. you wont regret it. probably.

another great product from diamond brand dog foods. our pups absolutely love this food. we add it to their dry chicken soup for the puppy lovers soul and they never leave any behind. thanks diamond for great pet food products!

text: the product is very tasty and convenient when i tried one. it arrived promptly. the problem is that what i received and even got a replacement order hoping to fix the problem had a best by date of only about 2 12 more months. if you buy this at the grocery yes it costs more there typically you have a best by date of 1218 months. if you are going to use the product promptly then the short shelf life date is no problem. but if you are buying it for emergency purposes meaning you plan on storing it for awhile it is not appropriate. i really like shopping at amazon but for the suggestion box if a product has a fairly short remaining shelf life that should be part of the product description.

for years i havent felt well dealt with all sorts of symptoms that all glutensensitive glutenintolerant or celiac sufferers know all too well. on the advise of a friend i have eliminated gluten from my diet and have been feeling amazingly well! but i sure missed waffles. i ordered pamelas ultimate baking and pancake mix and made waffles for breakfast this morning. it is wonderful to be able to enjoy one of my favorite breakfast foods and not be in pain afterward! and they were delicious! now to order the other pamelas products!

text: i find timothys hazelnut a good buy and a very good product. the flavor is as good or better than the more expensive products.

i bought these as soon as i saw them because organic candy is rare and scarce. i wasnt sure on the taste but as soon as i ate them i was blown away. they are so delicious! i love it when they are harder and chewier. these are the best gummy bears ive ever tasted period. i am so glad that this company exists! family loves these as well and the bags dont last long in our household. love them!
summary: best gummy bear ever!! better than all other brands!

text: if you like crystal light peach tea youll like mio peach tea. personally i cant discern a taste difference between the two. where this product is different however is in portions. the crystal packets are onesizefitsall made for a 12 liter water bottle. if your bottle is 20 ounces youll get a weaker tea. if you have an 8 or 12 ounce glass good luck estimating half or 34 of a packet to match your water volume.the mio container on the other hand is good for any size portion though it may take some practice to master it. one average squeeze of the teardrop is good for 8 ounces two for a halfliter and so on. each persons squeeze is variable so youll need to get the hang of how much works for you and for how strong you like your tea.my only complaint is that its hard to tell when the teardrop container is on its last squeeze. i ended up with a bottle with 20 ounces of water and enough tea concentrate for about 12 very weak tea indeed and a waste.
summary: its like crystal light as a liquid with flexible portions

text: on acreage in california that has been untouched for close to a centurythis is the only product that abates the poison oak and nonnative brooms.i use the tank sprayer and only spray the offenders. it works and the other native plants are lush and hardy now. the nonnative brooms can actually choke a forest.

i had never tasted these before. that they appear in the fall and presumably are not available at any other time of the year ? seems delightfully oldfashioned.what can one say about a sweet treat which consists of cookie chocolate and marshmallow? whats not to like? they do seem a little dry and might be better accompanied by a warm drink. theyre good but theyre not great. my guess is that they might be especially popular with children.

pros this 5pounder packs up heavily for the entire family or even the office to enjoy. yummy flavors thats surprisingly all natural organic how can anything so delicious be so organic?.not too sweet and really intense flavors as well.cons packaging needs heavy improvement as some of the sticks protrudes on the thin plastic packaging. also had 2 opened pops and 2 sticks without the lollies inside.varieties were inconsistent had way too many watermelons and too few blueberries....but whos complaining anyways???

all i can say is that i love having breakfast with my three favorite guys snapcracklepop!! hard to find the frosted version. the grocery stores and some box stores had them on their shelves for a couple months....and then they disappeared again...never to be seen. thank goodness i found them on amazon. i got the retaste of them and just cant let them go again. quick service and a good price. comn on kelloggs bring them back to the stores!thanks amazoncom
i am loving this bold blend of awesomeness!! great flavor and aroma! i can even brew a second smaller cup with one kcup and still get the great flavor from it!

while this brand of agave syrup is competetively priced the product itself is not worth the price. the consistency is runny and there is a distinct after taste i do not have with other brands. i use agave syrup everyday and was surprised with the nasty after taste and runniness of the product. i would not purchase this again no matter what the price is.
summary: virginia brand agave has after taste

text: i have to laugh at nancy kress 5 star review. she thinks this foodservice pack tastes better than the retail pack. perhaps it does but keep in mind that it contains a substantial amount of msg! many people are outright allergic to msg and suffer serious reactions to this ingredient. some of those symptoms according to the mayo clinic include headache flushing sweating facial pressure or tightness tingling or burning fluttering heartbeats palpitations chest pain nausea and weakness.for these reasons we do not consume msg and i recommend to my family and friends to avoid msg like the plague. many chinese restaurants have discontinued using this product and post notices to that effect thats how widespread a problem this is.after reading nancys misleading review here on amazon i purchased this product not knowing about the msg content. nancys current review makes it sound like kraft changed other ingredients in the retail smaller packets product to lessen the products good taste. all they actually did according to their customer service dept. is remove the msg from the retail packet formula.she is right about one thing the foodservice pack yields a much cheaper product per serving. the truth is the only difference i could find was that the foodservice pack contains msg and the retail package does not. we love the retail product and this is the only commercial salad dressing we use. i cant speak to the taste as we threw out the product once we saw that it not only contains msg but contains quite a bit of this flavor enhancer. it is 3 or 4 ingredients from the bottom of the list of ingredients which are shown by weight.i spoke with kraft foods the parent company that owns this label and they said that the msg was removed from the retail product years ago. no doubt because retail customers get to read the ingredient labels while the only people in the foodservice business that might read the ingredients would be in the kitchens of restaurants. the poor unsuspecting restaurant customers are getting a substantial dose of msg without ever knowing about it.the customer service rep at kraft said that they may remove the msg from the foodservice formula someday soon given the known health concerns about msg. however she could provide no firm date.if i could give good seasons dressing in the foodservice 7.6oz pack 5 negative stars i would do so. avoid the 7.6 oz until they remove the msg!on the other hand i give the good seasons italian dressing retail pack .7oz pack 5 positive stars as an excellent product i have enjoyed for years. good seasons salad dressing recipe mix italian allnatural 0.7 oz. 4count packets pack of 4

prosthe popcorn tastes the same as it always has. good.consthe plastic popup bowl packaging doesnt work very well. its difficult to open. if youre not careful youll end up spilling the popcorn all over the place while trying to open the bag. you might also burn yourself.i know some people like to eat out of the bag and if you do you will find this experience quite messy. the plastic portion of the bag does not soak up the oil like a traditional paper bag so it gets all over your hands.after popping 4 bags in 2 different microwaves i have come to the conclusion that these new bags simply do not pop as well as the old ones. i have more unpopped kernels and visibly less popcorn when i pour it out into a separate bowl to eat which i prefer. and 1 of the 4 bags leaked some oil into the microwave.the new bags are smaller than the old ones 2.69 ounces compared to 2.9 which used to be 3.3 ounces not too long ago. is this new packaging really just a scheme to hide a price increase?verdict2 stars.start with 4 stars for the taste about as good as microwave popcorn gets but not as good as homemade. subtract 1 star for the smaller package and another for the messy new bag.
summary: messy difficult to use new bag. less popcorn.

text: for me bear creeks chicken noodle soup mix has three problems 1 it tastes too salty 2 there are teeny little corn niblets in the mix who needs corn niblets in chicken soup? that stay rockhard no matter how long you simmer the soup and 3 the noodles are too broad. ive always been a fan of thinner egg noodles. this mix is okay in a pinch i guess but not my favorite. i do love many of bear creeks other products hot sour darn good chili etc. and theyre all wonderful.
summary: not my favorite bear creek mix but its okay.

text: i really like this peppered bacon salt on popcorn and its great in tomato juice. its probably great for alot of other drinks and dishes that i will eventually try. as a person who loves bacon but rarely eats it this offers the flavor without the fat.

my husband and i have been buying bostons mint tea for years and we are so grateful to find it on amazon! it is very difficult to find and often significantly more expensive in our area.we use these tea bags to make iced tea all the time. we consistently go through multiple gallons a week because the taste is so pleasant and refreshing. if you enjoy a delicious glass of iced tea with a slight minty bonus i recommend this! the fact that we can get six at a time delivered for our convenience makes a sweet deal even sweeter.

this product is pretty much exactly what it promises. granola dried strawberries and little bars of dark chocolate. i definitely agree with the name love crunch because i loved it and it crunched. but wow 10 servings per bag? i read this after i had eaten about half the bag in 30 seconds. so at 140 calories per serving this bag is 1400 calories. yikes. i had to immediately introduce my underweight kids to it to get it out of my house because i would have eaten the other 700 calories within the hour if i hadnt. lucky for me they loved it too and polished off the bag. whew! crisis averted! but if you need high calories or have way more self control than me it is absolutely delicious!

these are great! i have the dark chocolate and they really taste like dark chocolate! there are 4g of protein and 4g of fiber in each .95 oz bar. they are crunchy and not hard and dry like some others i have had. you would have to eat the whole box to fill you up but for a snack they are tasty..you get a bit of a chocolate fix the fiber kind of helps you feel like you ate more and the protein should give you some energy to make it till a real meal. my only criticism is that they are small but thats why they are a snack! enjoy!

i purchase 2 15 pound bags of 9 lives daily essentials a month for my daughters cats. they love it. she says they often gather around the carton and wait for her to open it. they know whats in there and cant wait for it to be opened. if the cats love it we love it. isnt that how it goes?

text: bought this for the color which was nice and vibrant. my issue that when covering a cake it was so soft it tore and sort of melted. and was bit sticky. i would rather use wilton or homemade to cover a cake. probably would be ok if you were just making decorations or embellishments.

i like bacon on burgers and blts and was hopeful that this would give the bacon taste without the health concerns of bacon. big disappointment. smells like the bacn bite dog treats i give my dog probably tastes similar also. imagine a cheap store brand mayo with liquid smoke and salt added youll get the idea. full of artificial ingredients and chemical additives. too salty and fake tasting. ill just stick with a good mayo and skip the bacon.

i loved this tea before the vanilla was added when it was just plain honeybush tea. it was delicious. the addition of vanilla really changed the flavor and i do not like it at all now. it seems bitter.

text: the door comes with the ms2 ultrasonic collar. after several months of use the top popped off the ms2 ultrasonic collar and the battery fell out. my dog was trapped outside all day in the florida heat. im lucky she didnt die from heat stroke.i called customer service. they told me that my dog had removed the lid!! i explained that my dog was unable to remove the caplid. the lady in customer service said to me are you saying the lid jumped off.perfect. i have to hear that when my dog is panting and drinking water like crazy due to a flaw in their product.

i try to choose healthy snacks when i have the option and i was pleased to see this brand available in a variety pack. while these fruit snacks are easy to tote around and very good for you the taste and texture missed the mark with me. all of the flavor varieties were a bit too tough and chewy. the green apple was tart enough to make my eyes water but the other three flavors were fairly good.

ofcourse we all know brown rice is healthier than white rice and im eating this now because ive gone on a stricter diet to lose fat and build some muscle...so i bought this rice. i dont know how or what brown rice is supposed to taste like but this rice is pretty much flavorless reason for 4 stars the other reviewers say its quite good and flavorful but honestly its really not. but id rather have flavorless rice than nasty tasting rice. i have no problem eating it at all. its healthy and it does not taste bad. also as a final note it does take a bit longer to cook than white rice i dont why but it does and its not that much longer though. i very much recommend this rice. if your looking for some good healthy brown rice this is a good one. if your looking for some flavorfull brown rice this isnt it but it doesnt taste bad though.

i have tried a few of the flavors in the variety pack and just love them! ive never been a chai tea fan before but i think i have converted. i think i will be giving the variety pack as a christmas gift to some family members. great great product!

when i got home from work yesterday my new presto flip waffle maker and golden malted waffle mix were waiting for me. i made a batch immediately. the recipe was so easy egg water melted butter. as i mixed it up i was afraid the batter would be lumpy but it smothed right out. i just used a wire wisk and a few quick strokes nothing strenuous.wow! the waffles baked up crisp golden and delicious. we ate them before i could even get them in the oven to keep warm. my kids begged me to make more for dinner so i did. well be having waffles very often. we love this mix and the presto flip waffle iron!

i was very excited to try this. i brewed it 3 ways vacuum press drip.this a relatively fine grind. id call it the finest limit of drip coffee. beyond that were getting into espresso territory.against my better judgement i tried it in my french press. the fine particles plug up the steel mesh making the plunger difficult to press. the finer particles got into the brew. there was a very thick sludge at the bottom of the cup. flavorwise it was intense but not bad. there was a slight bitter taste and a silky texture which i suspect was from the dust in suspension. so i ran it through a cone filter. the resulting brew was still intense but lost all of the vanilla aroma. the texture was too thin. it basically became a better than average cup of diner coffee. easy to drink dark tasty but nothing to write home about.i expected great results from the vacuum brewer. while brewing it filled the kitchen with vanilla but when i tasted the coffee there was only a hint of it. i dont think it brewed long enough to pick up the vanilla or maybe it was so hot the vanilla vaporized rather than dissolve. in any case the final product was only slightly better than the pressedthenfiltered coffee above. not recommended.surprisingly the best results came from my drip machine. i used the freebie gevalia gave me with membership yeah im a sucker for free stuff. im drinking the stuff now as i write this review and its exceptional. i only used 2 tbsp to 6 servings of water and the taste is just about right. it has a rich mouthfeel a fair amount of vanilla aroma a robust coffee taste.ive bought and tasted flavored coffees before and have come to the conclusion that most of the manufacturers are just masking cheap dry tasteless coffee with deceptively sweet aromas. those coffees rarely taste like coffee and never taste like the additional flavor which is why i call them scented coffee rather than flavored coffee. so color me jaded. but the stuff from my drip machine actually tastes like vanilla! and maybe my mind is playing tricks on me but im getting a hint of icecream too! im drinking it black no sugar so its pretty fascinating.bottom line when brewed 26 in an average 4 drip coffeemaker you get a delicious coffee treat with the usual starbucks buzz to brighten up your workday.
summary: raises the bar for scented coffee

text: brooklynn bean roastery coffee makes some wonderful blends of coffee.i love the names they have i do not have one blend that i dislike. fuhgedaboutit is a great blend. a must have

i too noticed a change in the ovaltine with the new packaging. it is extremely disappointing. the flavor seems a little different and the texture is definitely different. im not sure why they changed something that didnt need changing. i am no longer a loyal ovaltine customer it doesnt seem much better than nesquik anymore.

ive been purchasing sunbutter for several years for my son who has peanut and treenut allergies. i purchased the organic sunbutter the other day and did not realize it does not contain sugar so it is bitter. it is probably fine for a sunbutter and jelly sandwich but any other uses with crackers the bitterness makes in unedible. i already ordered the creamy sunbutter again.

i expected this would belook like what was shown on the bag..the beef tendons the slightly rounded twisty things ive always gotten before but these were super flat and easily crunched...these are not the beef tendons pictured in this bag used as the photograph unfortunately.

i purchased the eggstreme soccer easter gift basket for boys ages 6 to 9 years oldfor my nephew for easter. i was very disappointed when it arrived in a very tiny box. it looks nothing like the picture and has very few items in it. i have to go out and buy a bigger basket and add more things to it so i dont look like a cheap skate. i wont buy from this company again.

i mix this with costco cat food for my eight cats and have gotten great results. it contains no wheat corn or soy and my two cats with sensitive stomachs have shown an improvement since i added this to their diet. if i could afford to use this food exclusively i would. excellent product.

you will only receive one box of taco shells. in the box is a count of 12. do not believe the list price or the great sale price or how much the shipment weighs. all of them are wrong. you will end up paying 8.01 for one box of taco shells 12 in the box. this ad should be removed for being soooo miss leading. who would pay 38.40 for one box of taco shells but that is the list price? what box of taco shells weighs 5.9 pounds but that is what the product details states? in the reviews it is mentioned that you receive 144 taco shells. add it all up and the ad leads you to believe that you will receive 12 boxes of taco shells. you will not.

i liked this tea. i average a cup a day and i always use teabags instead of the loose stuff for the convenience factor. speaking of which that is my sole complaint about this tea. the bag didnt have a string which is what i use to drain the last few drops of water from the teabag.this is minor i realize. but my teadrinking is a ritual event. the boiling of the water the whistling of the kettle the dunking of the teabag and finally the squeezing and disposal of the teabag.bottom line though the tea was yummy.

text: these cherries are awesome my whole family loves them. we lived in germany for 3 years and to find a place state side to order these from is great we order alot of them beucase they sure go fast.

this smoothie is absolutely delicious! i credit this drink to getting me through my mothers death and the death of my dog one day later. i drank one of these every day during that time and i got through the stress of handling my mothers estate without any stressor illnesses. great stuff in my book.

weve tried the generic brands but keep coming back to honey maid. the kids say that they taste better and i have to agree. the honey flavor is more apparent the others taste a bit cardboardlike in comparison. i do use the generic brands for when i make a graham cracker crust as its not as noticeable when used in recipes. but for snacks we stick with honey maid.

heres the good news about kelloggs new krave chocolate cereal its fairly low in fat only about 25 of the calories in one serving very low in saturated fat fairly low in carbohydrates fairly high in fiber 3g per serving and it contains whole grains. its also chocolate flavored. heres the bad news that chocolate flavor means that sugar is listed twice in the ingredient listits the first ingredient listed as a subingredient of the first overall ingredient chocolate flavored filling and its the second ingredient listed overall. although the taste is fairly palatable sometimes theres a hint of that sweetenedcerealartificiality that plagues a lot of kids cereals. so krave is pretty much a kids cereal thats been healthed up for adults. reserve this for when you want to cheat a little on your wholesome and nutritious morning cerealbut i doubt this will become a favorite.

i love this product and i love the fact that i can support the company because of its business ethics. this is the best tea and the best chocolate product i have ever discovered.i found out about the tea by accident. i was really looking for chocolate nibs that were not covered in processed chocolate. their chocolate nibs are sold through eastbluff trading company and they got great reviews. the nibs are indeed amazing.but it is the tea that will keep me coming back. i plan to purchase this for all my tea and chocolate loving friends.preparation the instructions say to use 3 teaspoons full and steep for five minutes. i use more than the recommended 3 teaspoons but i steep it twice. i also steep it for longer. after steeping i pour it into my nissan travel thermos and add sugar in the raw to taste. the sugar in the raw enhances the flavor of any tea and it is the same with this one. i dont need much. it is delicious without the sugar but it is my treat so i do like a little hint of sugar.as far as im concerned this is better than a chocolate bar any day!
summary: doesnt get any better than this!!! nectar of the gods! plus organic fair trade!!

text: im not sure why but i do not like this as much as some other flavored coffees. the flavor is very noticeable but it does not remind me of vanilla the way i would like. i associate vanilla extract with the chocolate chip cookies i use it in or rich vanilla ice cream. i did not get that flavor in this coffee. i wont buy it again.
wow. they may have good numbers as far as nutrition or lack of bad things goes but wheres the flavor? yuk.

a little too fragrant and intense for my taste. somewhere between strawberry soda and grapefruit juice. leaves kind of a bitter taste in my mouth for an hour after drinking it which makes me feel as if im thirstier than before i drank it.note that this is a twoserving can with each serving having about as much caffeine as a cup of coffee.also take my lackluster opinion with a grain of salt i think energy beverages are a bit childish to begin with. this was the first one i ever tried.if you want juice drink juice. if you want coffee drink coffee. if you want soda well you get the idea. or maybe you just need a nap.updatebumping up a star. saved half the can for my 19yearold daughter and she loved it so well split the difference. i give it 2 she gives it 4 or more.

text: look demitris a seattle homie and i support anything our locals do in business but i think the hyperbole about this stuff is a little silly. is it a bad bloody mix? absolutely not. its flavorful and consistent. but i have never gotten why so many people seem to be so hellbent on tarting up what is a very simple recipe. demitris like every other commerciallymade recipe tucks in a whole laundry list of extraneous flavors baking spices onions jalapenos etc. etc. etc. that actually detract imho from the pungent meaty quality of a great bloody. ive had this one and nearly every other mix out there and never had one that was anywhere near as good as we find here in seattle at temple billiards. finally it hit me one day that ive been a chef my whole adult life and there was nothing stopping me from making my own. theres nothing stopping you either. its fun and interesting and you can get exactly what you like. im not saying dont buy demitris. if youre not creative or just really lazy its fine alternative. but a i dont like brown bloody marys that should be called a driedbloody mary and b its just better because its fresher. duh. if you enjoy demitris good on ya. but dont lose sight of the fact that you can make better or just as good right at home for a lot less .
summary: if youre too lazy to make your own...

text: this is a great price on a great tea. 25 for 4 boxes on sale. make sure you have some friends to share it with as 680 tea bags will go a long way. i would not keep it for over a year the tea is best after 3 5 minutes of steeping any longer and it gets bitter. wonderful with a spot of milk.

we tried this taco bell brand chipotle sauce on burritos and it did add flavor but to me was not spicey enough. i like hot stuff and this was good but wouldnt consider this spicy at all. try this sauce you may like it. it did add good flavor to our meal.

these are really cute bears but they taste horrible! i had a friend purchase them for me as a birthday present because she knows my love of gummy bears but man were these terrible! they are really hard and split in half and honestly you cant tell the difference in the flavors because they all taste like plastic. just pass these and get you a huge bag of small gummy bears instead!

i was so excited to receive a variety of flavors and brands but received only 3 different brands and 4 different flavors most of them were cappuccinos and i tried them and they were very very weak and sweet. disappointing.

i bought the vanilla flavor to have a convenient cup of coffee for 1 person without having to brew a whole pot. the taste is extremely artificial. its not a bad taste but it is not a true coffee experience. i wouldnt normally note that save for the fact that starbucks markets their via as an identical taste to their brewed coffee. i dont think i will be spending 7.00 for this product again. my three stars are for the convenience.

ive tried most of biggest brands in coconut water here on amazon. zico vita coco naked and o.n.e. they all tasted watered down some tasted rancidbitter and others tasted artificial and just plain awful. to put it best they all tasted stale. i was drinking zico before this because it was the most tolerable to me personally in terms of flavorconsistency. the flavor is comparable to sweetened corn water?. i decided on a whim to try taste nirvana after finding that the ss price was almost the same as what i was paying for zico. there is a huge difference in flavor! taste nirvana is subtly sweet the way nature intended a ripe coconut to taste like. the consistency is very rich and almost creamy... i am in love!!! the flavor really quenches my thirst and for me personally i tend to notice that my lips become a vibrant shade of pink as well as moisturized whenever i drink a great quality coconut water. i know it sounds weird but maybe some girls can relate? after drinking this coconut water my lips have been full soft and a rosy pink color dont need lipgloss anymoreso i know its working! i will never switch back to any other brand! thanks amazon for carrying such a wonderful product.

the olive tortilla chips are tasty but i certainly would not rate them the best tortilla chip ever. the olive pieces in the chips are very small and dried. they impart a light earthy flavor in the background and in no way overwhelm. these are excellent with dip and do not break easily like some other gourmet chips.

text: good size pieces of freeze dried liver. few small bits or dust common in some other brands. resealable bag is handy.

i make homemade bread every other week. i decided to pick up this brand at a local market instead of using king arthurs flour like i normally do. it was kosher so i decided to give it a try.the flavor of the wheat is superior to any ive used. this flour is wonderful in honey wheat bread. the flavor it gives is so good and my kids love it. i dont think im going to use any other wheat flour again. this is definitely worthy of its reputation.i used 34 of the wheat flour and 14 of organic bread flour and the bread was awesome. i thought it would be really dense and heavy but it actually came out lighter than expected without a heavy taste. you can only achieve that with highquality wheat. spring wheat is known to have more protein so you can probably get by without the bread flour during the spring and summer months for your bread.overall i am so happy i found a highquality flour that all of us can enjoy while being able to receive the nutritional benefits of stoneground wheat. its relieving to accomplish both with one product as its hard to do this with 3 kids. but they all loved it to my amazement. as did i.i think youll be really happy with it.

my dogs ate very picky so that makes me hesitant to try other dog foods. they usually like kibbles and bits the off brand with white pieces. those are gobbled down quick.so i was surprised that they so easily ate this brand of dog food. the bag it comes in is very sturdy. there is no way it will accidentally rip and spill on you. the dog food is also very healthy for dogs when compared to other dog foods available.

i purchased this flour because i was searching for a more digestible organic version of flour to use in cooking and baking at home for my family. love it! have used it a lot in my everyday cooking in such things as pancakes waffles breads pizza crusts soups and sauces. also it came with a packet full of recipes and ideas in how to use the flour which was really useful and much appreciated. great high quality product would purchase again and would love to try some of their other products such as organic sprouted spelt organic sprouted millet and organic sprouted long grain brown rice etc.

the product is wonderful. however the package contents were all bent and dinged when it arrived. i suspect the lack of expertise and lack of airpackets in packaging. one can was almost bent to a point of puncture.

how can you go wrong with having poptarts delivered to your door?!?! the price is right and its a guaranteed delivery when we need them. the frosted cinnamon seem to be the most popular at our local grocery store and is often sold out. the auto delivery from amazon solves that problem and keeps the kids happy for this loved yes not very nutritional! snack.

this is a fantastic snack food and oh so chocolately. i really think this is the best tasting cereal i have had in a long time and now instead of heading for the cookies and candy i grab a baggie of this. whats even better is to mix it with popcorn so that you have that salty chocolate yumminess that just makes you want to sit down with a movie or a good book and nibble along the way.i honestly dont care about how many calories this might have as im sure its less than other snacks that ive eaten and really it comes from a company that goes wayyyyyyy bsck to when i was a kid and is one company that i have loved and trusted over the years.krave has a nice crunchy outside with a really delicious chocolate middle that is sure to please. i also bought some of the the other flavor which has a white outside and chocolate inside and mix them together. i do hope this stays around for some time as im in love with it. yumm!
summary: fantastic chocolate fix that is really good!

in deciding to review this coffee i knew my opinion alone wasnt enough. while i found it to be a very smooth and nonbitter treat for my mornings i decided to take the biggest risk of all and serve it to my coworkers.cubicle inhabitants have been known to maim anyone responsible for a bad batch of coffee and i was prepared to either smile pleasantly or use my chair as a battering ram while i ran for the exit.the first person who tried it had this to say...it has a smooth taste which allows the drinker to savor the flavor without the bitterness or unpleasant aftertaste found in higher priced coffees such as those offered by starbucks. the overall taste is reminiscent of a light to medium roast seattles best. the only drawback i can see to this coffee is that now my cup is empty. overall i think it is a good coffee and a good roast. while i normally prefer darker roasts i would recommend this coffee as a good choice.what can i say hes an english major who enjoys a fine cuppa joe. i would still be pulling swingline staples out of my backside if he didnt like it.heres what another one said...on the initial taste when hottest one can mistake this for a light roast as there is no bitterness in the aftertaste usually associated with medium to dark roasts. on subsequent sipping the coffees taste does linger well afterword with little to no bitterness again much like a light roast but with fuller flavor that one expects from more robust roasts. this coffee has enough flavor to warrant very little sweetener and no cream at all which should make most coffee enthusiasts happy with this selection...recommended.this one works in tech support i would be typing this review with one hand if he didnt enjoy this coffee.i even made sure to get an opinion from the usual tea drinkerrighto. so as a teadrinkingmycoffeemusthavecreamersoidonttastethecoffee person here are my impressionssmell slightly bitter with an earthy tonesight rather dark not pitch black but dark enough for concern.taste black dirt with a side of mud. very straight forward coffee no messing about.taste with creamer...lots of creamer my tongue thanked me!not my favorite as a drinking coffee i prefer a lighter roast. but it would be a good baking coffee particularly if you used it for a dark mocha torte or for mocha cookies.so there you have it! i should also add that i usually dont make the coffee in my office ever since i served this i have been asked wheres that coffee you brought in last week? are you going to bring more?if its good enough for the cubicle crew its good enough for you.

this is a great tasting tea. ive had this before and couldnt find it in the stores so i got it from amazon. the peach fragrance is sooo addictive that i simply have to have it every day. a dream come true for peach lovers!

we have been using enfamil since my son was about a month old. we started with the ready to drink which he did great with. when i went to walmart and saw that they had raised the price from 4.44 to 7.16 a can we decided to try this. he spits up every time we feed this to him. he also is very gassy and fussy not like him. its too bad i made the bad decision to order 200.00 worth of this stuff. hopefully we can find a family that can use it becasue we are going back to the ready to drink.

text: santa brought both this rawhide ring and the rawhide knot by the same manufacturer for my dogs a catahoula who loves to chew and my docile shepherd mix who hasnt shown much interest in anything other than food and sleeping on the couch. both the ring and the know were a big hit with both dogs the ring more so than the knot. they both settled down quickly with these chews after investigating what the other one had. the cata worked on the ring for a bit and when she put it down the shep quickly picked it up and abandoned the knot. i thought this might cause a fight but the cata simply picked up the knot instead. the ring seemed to be easier for them to manuver in a comfy position and was definitely preferred over the knot but both were big hits. i will be purchasing more of these in the future.

this nutiva organic coconut manna is actually a type of coconut cream or coconut butter not coconut oil. the difference is that the cream or butter is much thicker has whole coconut in it and a very strong coconut flavor. you would not use the coconut manna for cooking. it is used more as a spread which you wouldnt usually do with coconut oil or can even be eaten by itself or made into a candy because it is slightly sweet. it can be added to smoothies or used in many other creative ways. think of it like whole coconut meat in a creamy form.the reason i did not give this coconut manna five stars is because it is packaged in a difficult way. first of all the container is plastic. in order to use the coconut manna the container must be heated gradually to a very warm room temperature say 80 degrees id think or else put in hot water for 30 minutes stirred and left in hot water for 30 more minutes. this is very inconvenient plus the plastic container is not good for all of the repeated heatings.other than that its a great product. it is very slightly sweet and tastes strongly like coconut. the consistency is a bit gritty or grainy due to part of the coconut flesh that is powder and has been reconstituted but i found that fine not offputting at all. its great all by itself added to smoothies or put into the freezer in molds for a whole foods raw candy.recommended.
summary: analog to coconut cream or coconut butter wonderful product

...but if youve had the good stuff this is a little bit disappointing. the wax is very waxy tasting instead of being really infused with the honey and instead of being soft and pliable it was brittle which is something ive never experienced with honeycomb. additionally the comb part wasnt full and completethe edges were broken and there were broken holes in the interior part of it instead of being a weavycomb like it should have been.on the plus side there was a good amount of honey in the box and the plastic packaging that its in is hard plastic with an easy enough pop top to it. when the product was delivered it had melted and slid all to one side and had leaked out of the packaging. im not rating this product by the packaging or the shipping though i gave shipping feedback elsewhere. this is just about the honeycomb product inside.its not bad and if youve never had the good stuff for a fair price this one is fine enough maybe to get for the kids to try it. if youre wanting it for cooking for a gourmet or specialty display or to use for something that requires a solid full and soft pliable wax this isnt your product.but for just sucking on some honeycomb and chewing some wax for kids who dont know the difference or even for breaking off a piece to drop into a tea or a hot drink this is good enough at a fair enough price.
summary: if youve never had good honeycomb this is okay...
