i am not sensitive to gluten and im thankful for that. my granddaughter and my dear friend are so i wanted to experiment with gluten free foods. i did not like any of the rice pastas one bit. a few years back i ordered bobs red mill organic quinoa flour and made the muffins on the package everyone raved and there was no other flours in them so my deduction is that its a broader spectrum flour to use for many things rather than all the mixes you have to concoct to make something baked thats gluten free and really not be able to tell the difference. i decided id order this pasta and see what its like. i absolutely love it to the point its the only pasta i buy. its just healthier all around...period. i have a parrot who totally loves pasta and this is a much better food for him too. whatever im eating he has to be eating too he even ate liver and onions! when i give him this pasta he doesnt come up for air and repeats goooood the whole time hes pigging out. he wouldnt eat the rice pastas. i buy the bertolli pasta sauces in the little bags amazing pasta sauces! and one bag is perfect for one box of quinoa pasta. it reheats very very well its good cold tho! its easy to overcook but once you get it down youll find it cooks a little quicker than wheat pasta. i do not add oil to the water but i use a cooking chopstick to keep it moving just until each strand of pasta is all separated and good and wet and i have no problem with it sticking together through the rest of the cooking process. i use the water to moisten my dogs dry food she loves it too.its so plainly bannered on the packaging and in the product description that its corn and quinoa pasta. i cant believe someone downrated the product because they didnt read what they were buying!
summary: really great tasting textured and goodforyou pasta

text: ive been a cooking and fine foods enthusiast for several decades. this is just an outstanding spice blend for most any type of seafood the best ive ever found. you can use it alone as in under the broiler with some butter and lemon in soups stews seafoodoriented pasta dishes or in tandem with other sauces. this morning i sprinkled some onto spreadable chevre on a toasted bagel with smoked salmon. fantastic ! the only bad thing about this product is when you run out ! it also has no sodium but great flavor which really gives the lie to the supposed need for all the killer doses of salt you find in so many products nowadays.the thing that really bugs me is how hard it is to find this item on the shelves anywhere. so many places have huge racks of spice hunter products of which there are a great many to choose from at premium prices but somehow this one never seems to make the cut. some whole foods locations had it briefly years ago. ive asked bristol farms to add it to their stock but i think they are phasing out of spice hunter entirely. the one place i could find it semireliably was erewhon in l.a. and even then they were usually down to the last couple jars. oh well . . . this just joins a considerable list of great products you can only find online. i suppose the much more reasonable price is adequate compensation for that.
summary: simply the best generalpurpose seafood seasoning

text: if you imagine that any sugar sweetener is significantly more harmful or healthful than another youre kidding yourself and playing the dupe for one marketing group or another. yes this is agave nectar. from blue agave. thats meaningful because blue agave juice is processed using just heat to convert the simple sugars. you get whats mostly fructose. it is an error to say its no different from hfcs. hfcs is a mix of fructose and glucose. and of course its from corn and has a few more processing steps. someone warned that its not a good for you as maple syrup. wise up. maple syrup is sucrose. different sugar the one in common cane sugar. its plain weird that people imagine common white cane sugar to be evil but then want cane sugar in their soft drinks instead of corn sugar. guess what. sugar is calorie intense. what one sugar does any other sugar essentially does the same thing. eat too much of it and you get sick.so how about this blue agave nectar. its raw which is also meaningful and not just in a treehuggy way. raw agave nectar is treated at lower heat than other varieties of agave nectar. and i think that comes through in the flavor which is distinctive fruity and pleasant and to me less cloying than honey. it is nearly all fructose which even to me knowing that most of the sugar ranting is b.s. has some appeal. this nectar is a pretty useful thickness a lot like maple syrup that hasnt been overly thickened. thick enough to coat what its put on and thin enough to flow over all of it unlike honey. if you want to try agave nectar you cant beat this one.
summary: dont buy this product if youre stupid

text: the label says pure cranberry in big letters. reading some mediumsize letters and they say its 100 juice and 100 pure full strength juice. but when you read the small letters you find its reconstituted from cranberry juice concentrate and theyve added ascorbic acid vitamin c 20. i dont know what the 20 means 20 of what? but i cant take vitamin c in my current situation so im not sure i can drink this stuff.

this candy was reminiscent of days in my youth. my mom always had a box of ribbon candy at christmas time. the flavor was the same. the only difference i found was that this was not as thin as what we used to get. but it was just as delicious. great product! yes i would recommend this for those who remember the good old days.

these bars are a great example of a sneaky marketing ploy by a major food corporation. by using the word nutri as part of the name of the product consumers are tricked into thinking these are healthy. these should really be called candygrain bars! heres the nutritional low down1. these bars contain 13 grams of sugar. notice the first ingredient in the filling is strawberry preserves made of high fructose corn syrup and strawberries. the next ingredient is...corn syrup followed by fructose which is also a sweetener. more sweeteners appear on down the ingredients list. out of the 140 calories in this tiny bar 62 calories come from sugar.2. these bars have partially hydrogenated oil in them. thats the type of oil that contains artery clogging trans fat. yuck.3. they contain less than 1 gram of fiber. that means that the bars include very very little whole grain or fruit either of which would increase fiber content.4. they do contain some vitamins. but these are all in the form of additives. they are listed at the end of the ingredient list. essentially theyve ground up a bit of a vitamin pill into each bar. obviously theres no need to eat candy to get powdered vitamins. if you want the extra vitaminsjust take a vitamin pill!5. while they were at it they added 5 dv of sodium per bar.i am not opposed to enjoying junk food now and then. if these bars tasted great i might indulge in one as dessert from time to time. however theres lots of junk food i like better...so i wont bother with these bars. a better choice for taste and nutrition is kashi tlc crunchy granola bar pumpkin spice flax 6 1.4 oz bars 8.4 oz or one of the other kashi bars. or real strawberries of course!pg author of feeding the kids the flexible nobattles healthy eating system for the whole family

from their online information these snacks looked so nutritious that they were almost too good to be true. however i ended up only eating half of one bag and throwing the rest away. i thought they tasted disgusting.

summary: good kit not worth stated price.

i love almost all tabasco products and living in louisiana i can buy them local. however this specialty hot sauce was not done right. unfortunately the first ingredient of this stuff is highfructose corn syrup. notwithstanding taste it pours thicker than any sauce ive ever seen that it looks gummy almost. for a louisiana company youd think they would support their local sugar farmers and at least use a sugar syrup instead. id stay away from any product with highfructose corn syrup and this is one of them.

the gold kili ginger lemon drink is for people who really like ginger others beware. theres enough ginger in a onecup serving to give that warm and tingly feeling as it goes down. its not too sweet for my taste and the lemon flavor is more or less in the background. gold kili makes a pleasant hot drink to enjoy during the colder months and many believe that ginger helps an upset stomach and aids the digestive process. one could make a similar and probably better concoction using fresh ingredients but these instant mixes are for convenience. its not something that id buy regularly but gold kili isnt bad for what it is.

ive never had caviar before but based on the glowing reviews and the cheap price i thought id cross caviar of my bucket list. i love the flying fish roe that comes on sushi though its pretty tasteless the little pop! of the eggs is addictive and i love overly salty food i regularly drink pickle juice but this was fishy. blech! the flavor was akin to fish skin that has sat on the counter all day. others had mentioned the dye and for the cheap price i wasnt too worried about that but the purple flecks almost as big as the eggs themselves that appeared on the cracker were unnerving. this was so horridly fishy that i had one bite and that was enough for me. growing up and still residing in the pacific northwest ive eaten a lot of fish in my life but this was the most fishy thing ive ever eaten. it was like licking the sand at low tide. maybe all caviar is like that and if so i dont know how anyone can eat it. so if you like savoring the flavor of codliver oil this is the stuff for you but if you dont like a mouth full of the taste of whale ejaculate steer clear!
summary: thought id try a bite of the good life

i love this product line. i have been on a low carb diet for 5 years and never found an acceptable low carb pasta until i discovered the dreamfields line. these pastas look and taste exactly like regular pasta but do not release the large amounts of starches and spike your blood sugar as do regular pastas. i have used nearly every type of dreamfields pasta and have found them all to be excellent. i have served them to guests without telling them it was low carb and they couldnt tell the difference. you must cook the pasta exactly as the package directs and no longer. if you reheat the pasta it will lose the low carb effect. as with all pasta products the longer and softer you cook the pasta the more carbs and starches the pasta will release. i only make as much as i will eat when it is first made and i even cook it a minute or two less than the package says. you must also watch your portion size as with any food. while i am not diabetic i can certainly see how this would be a huge benefit to anyone who is. my only complaint is that the full product line is not carried by my local supermarkets. i usually can find only the spaghetti elbos and penne locally but have to mail order the other shapes. the price is a little higher than some other pastas but is well worth it for the health benefits.

summary: ok taste but you need to add a lot.

any drive back from a relatives place when i stop to get gas prior to beginning the drive home i intentionally go to the gas station that i know carries this item when i get back in the car open that first bag i let myself enjoy 2 of the 1.5ounce bags as i head off into the sunset youd think i was about to bite into the worlds best chocolate cake or the greatest pie or a mindblowing cheesecake yes this stuff is right up there with the rest of my hallowed favorites when it comes to savoring every single tastebud interaction but whereas the confectionary treats are otherwise enjoyed on relatively rare occasions largely restricted to celebratory events my partaking of these delectable skinless almonds their goldilockslike just right mix of sea salt oil is more on a wheneveranyevery time i can basis renders whatever moment i can have them dance across my tastebuds its own celebratory event tastebud holiday if you will...yeah its safe to say that i love these little bits of almond nirvana... be warned however these things are addictive... if you should make the mistake of placing a bowl of these out at a party or family gathering youd better make sure youve arranged for refills or risk the frustrated wrath of those who suddenly find themselves craving more who might be driven to suddenly leave the premises in search of more albeit with one parting inquiry hey where did you get these?...to whoever dreamed up let alone greenlit the manufacture of this product oh the power of what you have unleashed... even if we end up being a cult following know that this cult of the sea salt oil ized skinless almond enjoy the dickens out of this wondrous almond delight...these taste so good... what a nice little dance of textures with the slick oil on a surface thats smooth gets moderately crunched then the wonderful taste of sea salt oil getting introduced to the previously unexposed interior aspects of almond that have been newly released due to chewing... i know i sound ridiculous but oh this is yummy... what a delightful series of minutes for ones sense of taste...
summary: my love letter to this product...

text: i enjoyed the salba much more so than flax seeds. it has a nice nutty taste and can be mixed well with oatmeal or eaten alone. i didnt find that it gave me more energy as some websites have purported but knowing it is good for me is enough for me.

i used to buy these as a kid when the convenience store near me had a big tub of them and they sold them individually and put them in a small paper sack. i loved them then and they are still just as good now! so glad i found them on amazon! we have already gone through three of these boxes because everyone in my family loves them and whenever someone visits they eat them too. they are definately my favorite candy!

ive tried three different flavors of starbucks natural fusions coffee so far. even though i love cinnamon and sometimes add some ground cinnamon to my coffee grounds to flavor regular coffee i didnt much care for the flavor of starbucks cinnamon flavored coffee. this vanilla flavor is pretty good however though i will say that i dont like it enough to buy it again. the real winner of the three is the caramel flavor. while drinking it wont make you think youre eating a caramel candy it does have a very pleasing flavor whether consumed hot or cold. thats the only flavor of the three that i have purchased repeatedly and will purchase again.as for the underlying coffee flavor of this particular flavor i think it suffices to say that it tastes like a medium roasted starbucks coffee. i happen to like starbucks coffee beans but i know some people dont care for the brand. if youre a fan of starbucks this roastflavor is consistent with what youve come to expect from them.

this is a great snack. great texture and taste. low in calories low in sodium no msg or other bad stuff. yeah!taste a lot like those other cheese puffs but less salty. i love em. i buy via subscribe save for lowest cost.
summary: great tasting snack low in sodium and calories

text: grocery stores regular potato chips taste far better and even the healthy a bit bland lays baked chips taste better. these still have salt and are expensive.
i like this plant very much because it is different and it is easy to take care of. i would recommend this plant to anyone who is looking for another different kind of plant.

i loved twinings earl grey many years ago but heard the company had weakened their formula so i ordered the bigelow instead. it smells good but what a disappointment. it was way too bland. id rather drink plain lipton.

we have many food allergies in our family mainly kids. we were sooooo excited to find this peanut free almond butter. it is expensive but worth the price when its your only option since we cant have peanut or soy products. it takes better than soy nut butter. it is very very tasty and spreads easily and doesnt separate.
summary: very yummy!! great for peanut butter and soy alternative

text: first of all somebody is chasing me around and negging all my review so dont pay anyattention to those no votes they both arrived within minutes of posting this review.this sickly sweetish molasses flavored thing is not jerk sauce doesnt even remotelyresemble a bad facsimile. i dont know what world harbors is thinking cause this stuffis horrible.btw i like their teriyaki sauce but this..... its as bad as it gets.

my 5kittens loved this it is hard to find kitten food for 6week old kittens up they loved this. and it gives them what they need thur growing spouts. they are really picky i tryed other brands wasted money. they are now 8 weeks old love the chicken liver they also like chicken soup for the kittens soul too also on amazon.com. i just ordered the proplan kitten in salmon hope they will like it. thank you for selling this cant find this anywhere at grocery stores.

i really enjoy iced coffee drinks. i can make an iced drink with a regular coffee kcup but id much rather make it with the green mountain nantucket iced kcup. i just love the flavor that it has. i tried the french vanilla iced coffee kcup and i thought id like it since i love vanilla. but yuck! i did not care for that one at all. my favorite way to prepare the nantucket iced coffee is to brew a 6 ounce size about a half an hour before i leave for work without ice. i mix in about 23 tsp. sugar and a few drops of vanilla extract or the vanilla from trader joes that does not have alcohol in it. i let it cool in the frig for about 2030 minutes then i pour it over a 16 oz. size insulated cup full of ice leaving about an extra inch on top in order to pour on some organic half and half. the coffee will still be warm when you pour it over the ice but it will melt the ice just the right amount but not too much. nummy!

kind nuts spices dark chocolatye nuts sea salt bars are a tasty snack but labeling them dark chocolate is misleadingthey are basically a bar of walnuts almonds peanuts and rice krispies glued together with honey and chocolatewhile tasty the main problem is the chocolate. i really wouldnt call it dark. it certainly did not taste like dark chocolateotherwise its pretty good. low sodium low sugar no sugar alcohols or artifical sweeteners gluten and transfat free.id say other than the chocolate not being that dark these bars are one tasty snack
summary: good. but not really dark chocolate

text: roland minced clams cost us about 0.50 more per can than the brand my supermarket often has on special but they are worth it! the clams are fullflavored as is the clam juice. when we made our favorite white clam sauce for linguine with roland clams the dish moved up several notches on our list of family quick meal favorites. these minced clams are excellent we were so happy with them we will try other roland products.
summary: more expensive but well worth it!

text: we love natures path cereals and especially this one. but we were very disappointed that the granola bars are not as good as the cereal is!
summary: not as good as the cereal

text: these are pretty interesting... they arent that good at all. we bought them on a road trip and landed at a hotel one night. all the fast food places were closed so we ate what was left of our food... two packages of these. my daughter who is gfcf had opened them and spit them out... my sister and i ate them and gagged... but we were hungry ha...they have the pretzel crunch but the taste is off... maybe if there was more salt.. or flavor..i wouldnt but them again.

we had been feeding our baby for weeks using this formula but then realized the studies recently found.i guess we did not want to believe it but call the company after all. first it was hard to get someone qualified about the issue the lady was nice but couldnt help us.so she toke our number saying someone would get back to us but nobody ever did do they want to stay away from the arsenic issue???nutrition is so important in a babies first few months of life that we now use another brand and have moved on from this one.its so dissapointing that they have to add sweetner anyway! i mean its a baby formula and being one of the first ingredient it tells you a lot.we now use the holle brand it was very hard to get before but fortunately now avaiable on amazon! much better quality more organic and especially no added extra useless stuff that should not be in a baby diet!
summary: not good! arsenic and no call back now using holle

text: i came across amara a few weeks ago while shopping at a whole foods. i was impressed by the taste and the uses and i started using it after my workouts and love the effects! when you really need to rehydrate this is the way to go! you feel it right away and it tastes great!

i dont see how some reviews can say that there is no peanut butter flavor. i can totally detect it...however i feel that i have really sensitive taste buds i can detect trace amounts of salt in cooked products and small amounts of sugar drive my mouth crazy. i will admit that it is more subtle than regular ice cream but i kind of expected it since there are no egg yolksfats to intensify the flavor.arctic zero is a good brand to try if youre satisfied with mediocre ice cream and want to pay a hefty price. however i do admit that it is a good alternative if youre watching calories.

we have 3 dogs and they love it. we bought these after being told that raw hides were very bad for dogs. it is important to us that our pets stay healthy and happy. this is the second order i make as our dogs love them and as we give some to other dogs too. you cant go wrong with this. one hoof will provide hours of joy and it is also good for your doggies teeth!

i use this product to flavor my coffees or add sweetness to my morning smoothies. it has a fairly plesent vanilla flavor. must be used sparingly beacuse it is rather strong. the bottle lasts me quite a long time.

excellent taste and texture. it uses maltitol a natural sweetener unlike other sugarfree maple syrups which are all made with sorbitol plus artificial sweeteners such as astartame nutrisweet or sucralose splenda.through amazon.com i can afford josephs sugar free maple syrup. otherwise locally the price is prohibitive ....suggestion to company the seals protective tape works better wraped around the lids seal rather than just strapped over it.
oh my! with the hot weather weve been having this hits the spot. im sure well need more before this summer is over.

i have enjoyed ahmad cardamon tea for over a year...i am a regular tea drinker and have found ahmad teas superior in all ways...this particular tea has a deep robust flavor never bitter a great morning wake me up tea...i have shared it with friends and all have loved it...i have tried their mango apricotearl grey and evening teas i love them all...enjoy

i thought i would try this and hope upon hope it might taste good. well it was great not good. i could not believe it was sugar free. i received the product in record time and could not believe it even looked good.
when the stores in my neighborhood stopped selling it it was like losing a dear friend. tricolor orzo is perfect for summer salads adding needed color and variety. a terrific replacement for rice.
summary: riceselect orzo tricolor pasta 32ounce jars pack of 4

text: i give this product three stars because i love zukes for our dog and i am sure that if our cat would eat these theyd be way better for her than the high fructose corn syrup crud she prefers. but the sad truth is she doesnt like em. and for a cat that will steal pickles i think thats saying something.
summary: kitty doesnt like em but im sure theyd be good for her!

text: it came in the mail in perfect condition the flavor was fantastic and the texture was perfect. if you like pineapple gummy bears these are definitely worth it. they arent clear like in the picture but has a light yellow hue like pineapple juice would have.
tastes good not amazing. this coffee has a very similar flavour to caribou blend but not quite as good imho.
it is so hard to find jordan almonds in the store and ordering on the internet was a fantastic experience. great service anddelicious candy. will order again. thanks.

ive tried 4 different flavors of the switch brand beverages. this is my least favorite due to the overly sweet candy like taste. truthfully i was only able to drink about 13 of the can before i had to put it down. if they would lighten up on some up the more sugary juice and let the other flavors come through it might not be as bad but even my kids thought this one was too sweet. this may be considered a healthy alternative because it is made with fruit juice and no added sugar but the taste says otherwise.

chicken meal can be those cute little chicks that would have grown to be roosters. excess at the hatchery so the little buggers get ground up often alive for animal food. it is not those guys then it is poultry processing byproducts and not something i want for my pup. it smelled delicious very wholesome. didnt smell like dog food usually smells when you buy something from local petshop. also price went up when i ordered it via a subscription.
summary: disappointed that chicken meal is one of leading ingredients

text: i did not order nor receive this product and do not understand why its on my list of products to review. i gave it one star only because i was not permitted to submit a review unless i checked at least one star. i personally do not care for powdered creamers and i am unable to give an honest opinion of this or any other brand of powdered creamers.

i thought that this was 5s react gum. i had previously chewed that gum and wanted to get it in bulk. i received 5s react2. it has a different taste which i dont like as much. so just beware that thus us not react gum.

im on the fence with grove squares cappuccino cups french vanilla.on one hand for the price at least theyre great. sadly on the other hand theyre way too sweet for an every morning drink. the first time i tried it i had already added cream and sugar before i ever took a sip. that was a bad idea.id buy it again in a lesser qty but 54 of these is going to last me a long time. they arent bad at all i just wasnt expecting such a sweet drink.

one reviewer said it was not medium brew and it doesnt taste like medium brew at all. i had ordered their decaf and it is amazing! i made one for my sister and she said it sure didnt taste like decaf...and shes an orthodox coffer drinker. so she came up after i recieved this 5050 just for her and she said it was really weak. she made another cup and put another pod in with the first one and used less water and it was still weak! she came up after that and made this coffee dumped it out and said she was going to use my decaf and dont order anymore of this crap and that girl wouldnt even drink decaf before. so for us cancel that subscribe and save and stick with the decaf. seriously this is not even close to medium roast!

its too bad that they felt the need to sweeten these lovely blueberries with high fructose corn syrup.what was wrong with leaving them alone? i wont purchase these again. they took something extremely goodfor you and turned it into candy.
i love macademias and ive ordered this same product directly from mauna loa previously. these seemed a bit stale so next time ill order from mauna loas website.

cherry flavored pop tarts are my favorite. these taste the closest to real fruit and i love them warm from the toaster. i buy them on sale and in bulk and our whole family loves them. this is one of the basic flavors that has staying power over all the new kid friendly flavors they have been developing the past few years.
summary: gooey fruity sweetness in a box

text: while i enjoyed the product and will order it again i recently requested a refund for an order that went to the wrong address. i sent an email and never got a reply. i dont know where my shipment went but i didnt receive it or a refund. i had put this product on a repeat order for once a month. however when undeliverable the merchandise was returned to shipper. like i said the product is great! it gives you energy and doesnt taste bad. charged with fulvic acid it really gave me a boost. i do recommend the product i just wish the customer service matche the awesomeness of the product.

im generally a big fan of choice teas. love their rooibos tea twig tea and chamomile tea. so i decided to try their genmaicha. its not bad but its definitely nowhere above average. it essentially tastes like a rather weak green tea. whatever brown rice is in there is barely noticeable at all. if you didnt know this was genmaicha you would think its just regular green tea. and not that great green tea either. i expected more from choice and will go back to buying the japanese brand.

since there are so many rave reviews about greenies i thought id add some balance. when i ordered these i assumed my cat would certainly love them too but thats not the case. he actually prefers his dry kibbles to these treats. just to use them up im mixing them into his kibbles so he can be tricked into eating them.
summary: to add balance to the reviews

text: i have used bennetts chili sauce for years and will not use any other. it has a depth of flavor not found in other chili sauces. add a bit to your cocktail sauce and you will see why..

the rainbow chip is okay. everyone one in the family felt the pillsbury funfetti tasted better. i had high hopes for this product because it looks delicious unfortunately looks can be deceiving. it is not disgusting just not tasty enough to justify purchasing it again.
summary: not as good as pillsbury funfetti

text: i have been ordering this as a subscribe and save for months now and have been happy with the product and the quality that i receive. however the last order i receivedwhich arrived in a sealed boxcontained two punctured bags in the box. though i imagine they are probably fine they could have been tampered with or they could have been infested with bugs. unfortunately im not sure what can be done about the problem so im writing this review. it may make me reluctant to continue placing orders through amazon.
summary: good product recent problems with packaging

text: excellent flavor. you might add a little bit stevia to sweeten the mix. also please try the hibiscus tea from davidson

being born near the txla border i know dirty rice. even though chacheres dirty rice mix is a louisiana brand there is something rather strange about the taste of this mix. believe it or not a better tasting dirty rice mix to me is the great value dirty mix that can sometimes be found at walmart. ive noticed lately that it is difficult to find at walmart stores.
summary: not my favorite dirty rice mix

text: im new to gluten free living and this is the first bread mix that i purchased. i am very pleased with this product. it is very easy and quick to do which is nice when having to bake bread just to eat is a little overwhelming. this is yeast free and comes out a bit like a pound cake but its good and simple for quick bread. it makes great pancakes to!
summary: great yeast free gluten free bread

text: while ill admit being outraged at the price they charge for these little plastic squiggles they are well designed and my cats love them. theyre light enough to bat around easily and theyre the right size to pick up in their mouths to carry around.

this is a great coffee buy if you have a single server machine.i have the black and decker and they work very well.keep the open bag in the fridge to keep them fresh.i have the automatic delivery and that saves me even more
summary: great by for the single server machines

text: these come individually wrapped with a reasonable shelf life. they can be added to a candy jar or added to a day pack or lunch bag. they make a good fruit snack or small dessert. i personally liked the flavors. i have purchased these in bulk to add to halloween bags but they are also available for smaller size orders.
summary: fruit snacks high in vitamin c

text: great taste nice because it is softer then regular jerky. makes it a lot easier to enjoy. i also like the autoship feature.
summary: great taste softer then regular jerky

text: i have purchased many different brands of this type of fruit. this is by far the best tasting of all i have tried. it has no offputting bite to it. many do! i love it so much i cannot stop making my homemade pannatone. i guess i can thank you for these 5 extra pounds!!! if you use this type of producti am italian so i do i highly encourage you to give it a try. maria domenica

this is the only way to get the benefits from green tea. the blend of spices is so good. i like it iced with truvia. easy to drink and refreshing. a great tea to take on the go. cant say enough. i found it at my local albertsons grocery but am anxious to use the convenience with amazon.
summary: finallya green tea that is drinkable

text: im not sure what spice is causing it but this tea has the wet dog smelltaste to it. yay rooibos yay cinnamon boo wet dog. definitely not my favorite tea im not looking forward to working my way through the box. heres hoping its better iced.
summary: it has that wet dog smell

text: i think some of this works but bottom line is goo dream recall and im sure people get paid to post on here.i had a few vivid dreams from this stuff but read reviews or maybe get seeds and have a steady amount to experiment with
ive ordered this twice really nice flavor and i find many things to serve it with. wish the jars were bigger though but it will be an order regular for me.
my favorite spaghetti dinner of all time...been eating it since i was a kid...im 50 now.sad thing is i cannot find it in the stores anymore...dont stop making this!!!!

these taste so delicious! very chocolatey and hits the spot if you have a chocolate craving. its a much better option than kit kat since it has lower calories. i do recommend you buy this elsewhere. i got a box from walgreens for 4.99. edit i didnt realize at the time that these bars contained partially hydrogenated palm oil. so why does the nutrition label read 0g trans fats? its because the government doesnt count trans fat of less than 0.5g per serving. the problem is however if you consume beyond the serving size. is it a low calorie chocolate bar? yes. is it healthy for you? no. so make your choices wisely.
great way to get gatorade and have lots of it on hand. we have the storage and therefore going to the store and paying their rediculous prices is shameful.

i have only used a pack of the mastic gum to date but find it pleasant and it being a smaller piece of gum makes it easy to carry around in the mouth for long periods. maintains its level of freshness and does seem to cleanse the breath. too early to judge other dental claims.
summary: seems to live up to its claims . . .

text: weve been using greenies pretty much since sadie was a kitty shes about 3 now. she recognizes the word greenies and no matter how quietly i open the bag she can hear it from anywhere in the house even when shes sleeping a handy trick when i need to locate her. we switched to canned food about a year ago so the liberal use of dental treats has become a necessity.i urge all my fellow cat lovers to read up on the health problems associated with dry cat food. i cant pitch another web site here but urge folks to go online and look up info on switching from dry to canned. cats really do live longer on wet food diets.
the numi moroccan mint loose leaf tea is great tasting and priced right. i was buying the bags at the store and it took me a while to find a loose leaf equivalent.

i am comparing these to vitalicious and they are not as filling for the calories.they do have the moistness of a real brownie and taste like the fudgie brownie but they are smaller and the packaging is too much for what you get.i like them but i am staying with vitalicious.there is one important item that these do not have which is very important for people who do not want iron added to their diet. this does not have iron listed on it.vitalicious has 50 of the rda of iron in each piece. i have tried to get them to get it out but they do not listen.glennys brownies are much better for having no iron added.
summary: these are good tasting but not too satisfying.

text: while the taste isnt in any way bad its also nothing really new. inca cola is basically just cream soda. there are hints of another flavor but its tiny and i couldnt always place it so it may just be me desperately searching for something that isnt there.its cheap enough though so if youre interested then give it a shot.
this dog food contains no poultry by products which is important for older dogs. the lamb is gentle on the digestive system and the rice adds the right bulk without a lot of filler of most grains.
i prefer bold coffees. i like emerils bold the best. if i dont have emerils or dont want to spend the this is a good alternative.
dark magic is one of my favorite types of kcups and the decaf has the same great flavor as the regular variety. recommended if you like strong bold coffee.

ive been buying this brand and this can for some time at our local natural pet food place. my cat enjoys most everything but i would prefer to feed her food i have a higher belief in its naturalness and this is one brand i feel that way about it.unfortunately amazonwhatever company is selling this for more than i can already purchase the brand. a can currently costs 1.99 at the local pet food place so i wont be buying this online.

although fruit punch is not on the list of my favorite flavors i still thought this tasted pretty good. the ingredients are really good except for the sucralose. no carbs sugar or calories! packed with vitamins but not enough for me to stop taking my daily supplements. im not sure how much the bottle makes but i guess itll at least make a gallon if you dont make it too strong. as a healthy substitute for other drinks and even juices due to their high calories i will recommend this vitamin squeeze.
summary: healthy and good tasting in a handy container

text: orange spritzer definitely takes me back to my childhood going to the local expensive healthy food store ran by some pretty hip hipsters.something about bubbly orange juice just makes me smile and fills my liver with nostalgia.i was fortunate to buy a 24 case of izze fortified sparkling juice for about 19 with an amazon coupon that took an additional 10 off after the ss took 15 off. couldnt walk away from that much saving.after receiving the heavy amazon box in the mail i decided to pop a can of izze and boy it takes me back. this is really a refreshing drink this comes from a reformed soda junkie who now drinks seltzer water in his days of purity.the can is really small and compact i can see moms throwing these into their kids lunch or even calorie cutters sipping a can during break or with dinner.everything about this drink is pretty amazing except for one thing its 8.4 oz. i like to take pretty big gulps when i drink so one can is consumed in about 3 gulps. good for quenching thirst but to get through a savory meal i would need to drink about 2 of these which isnt that bad. i feel its just a hassle cracking open a can in the middle of dinner.all in all definitely would be good for someone who wants to cut back from soda but maintain that fizz that izze is. also its a good treat for people trying to lose weight or kids as a alternative to soda.
summary: who loves orange spritzer? i do..i do.i do i do i do!

text: i bought this looking for a healthier alternative for chocolate milk. unfortunately the kids dont like it at all and i have to admit i didnt really care for it either. i had a hard time getting it mixed in so it tasted grainy. i tried mixing it in the blender for smoothies and the blender couldnt even get it mixed in. ive been able to sneak it into pancake mix and oatmeal just to use it up but i wont be buying it again. i give it 3 stars for nutritional value.

these candiesall five pounds of themare out of this world. they are extremely soft very easy to chew. they are also the most translucentthe closest in appearance to plain waterof any gummy candy ive seen. so the colors of these translucent candies are pale pale aqua pale pale yellow pale faint red. beautiful and different from a traditional bunch of say gummy bears. another departure from the standard gummy bear is that each of these pieces is roughly 1.5 to 2 times the size of a gummy bearso theyre nice and large chunky easy to pick up and hold. the flavors are extremely pleasant and very subtle.if youre ready for a change from your current gummy candy give these a try. i think youll be delighted with their flavor taste and pretty forms.
chocolate and bananas go great together. this vegan chocolate bar has small pieces of banana in it and is very good. its rich and sweet with the bananas.

there are a lot of energy drinks shots bars etc. out there and this isnt the worst. it didnt leave me feeling like id crashed a few hours after drinkingtaking it but it also didnt exactly turn me into a tiger full of energy. the taste is vaguely berrylike albeit not like any berry found in nature. if i was looking for energy shots i might try this again ive had better luck with a 10minute walk andor a cup of coffee or tea even decaf followed by a tall glass of water.

ive tried many different brands and shapes of rice pasta over the years. even if you find a brand you like not every shape turns out to be good. this is one brand and shape combination that gets it one hundred percent perfect! the pasta is tasty and cooks up al dente works well in recipes like macaroni and cheese baked zit type dishes and just about any other recipe ive added it to.one exception to the rule when used in cold salads like macaroni salad the macaroni tends to get hard when refrigerated overnight. it works just fine to bring macaroni salad to chilled temps but overnight seems not to work. tomato sauces and cheese sauces dont seem to have the same problem.very pleased with this product and highly recommended.

i was looking around amazon and i noticed that you can get these as 2 oz. single bottles for 2.50 a piece here at amazon. at this price it works out to 2.90 a piece. a word to the wise shop around before paying higher prices and do your math! i rated 3 stars as i havent tried the product yet.
pamelas is a great mix! i use it not only for pancakes but it also make great biscuits waffles and loaf cakes.

i love love love these crackers! they do not taste like a low glycemic index glutenfree snack but they are. delicious with goat cheese. i highly recommend them. havent tried the other flavors the rosemary is just so good.
summary: rosemary ones are to die for!

text: i just went to publix to buy this for 3.69 and it sounds absolutely delicious but it tastes just like regular canned beef stew nothing special. i add to more spices and cheese to this to make it taste good. im thoroughly disappointed. dont bother spending your hard earned money. if i could give this soup 0 stars i would.

i too tried to find these locally for my daughter who fell in love with them at the movie theater where she works. they are strangely delicious. i will agree that after 20 boxes we were both feeling a little sick....but we plan to eat all 30 boxes ourselves!!

i got a keurig machine for my significant other as a birthday gift and got to choose a free coffee pack to go with it at the time of purchase. later on we both tested it and within a few minutes of trying it my throat started to swell.i have a severe allergic reactions to red dye 40 including anaphylactic shock from ingesting any amount of it. according to the resources i spoke to red dye is something often used on nuts as a preservative apparently including those used in green mountain coffee. that regardless it would have been nice to have some sort of ingredient list on the package its a large risk they are placing customers whom are unfortunate enough to possess such food allergies.
delicious like the regular snack treats but a sugar rush is the last thing i need early in the morning. as a snack by hand out of the box at other times fine.
summary: delicious but can do without the sugar rush

text: excellent better then any other already prepared or mix your own taste. our discount food chain deleted this product located it on amazon at even a lesser price plus free shipping.
summary: mix your own good season salad dressing

text: im not a big mm eater but these!!! i could sit and eat an entire bag! i was in ga for a couple of months and able to get them and kept myself stocked. unfortunately i had to leave and head to a state where a walgreens wasnt available and no other store stocked them. i was very unhappy to not be able to get and keep them while they were available.

if you are a fan of caramel corn or crackerjacks you will enjoy these. essentially they are a heavily covered caramel corn drizzled over with just the right amount of chocolate.i am trying to be specific about the level of caramel since the brand i have been using is actually kettle corn with the chocolate and taste quite different than these do. these are much sweeter and really hit home when it comes to having a sweet tooth.since they have 150 calories you will need to be cautious about including them in your diet but if you are a caramel corn fan it will be well worth finding a place for these.

about the only time i eat something like this is when i havent allowed enough time for a proper breakfast before dashing out the door. these bars are tasty and filling without being overly sweet as some such products are. yummy.

tried these buns with a ball park frank and homemade chili. yum. the bun stayed together where so many gluten free products fall apart. there was also no after taste. it worked and tasted just like a hot dog bun should taste.
mmmmmmmmm!!! better than any chocolate you can buy in your local grocery store unless your local grocery store carries this.

my kids got ahold of this and took it all before i ever got the chance to taste it. they took it to their apartment. i had to take their word for it when they told it was awesome sauce. they say they put it on everything. so youll have to take their word for it. but i never got to try it.
summary: never got to taste itkids stole it

text: yes this stuff is tasty. it can be used like peanut butter as it says on the package so i suppose on bread fruits ice cream milk shakes. i saw a recipe for a microwave mug cake using this spread. but be careful it is not as healthy as peanut butter so i dont see it as a real alternative. peanut butter is great for feeling full in a jiffy because it has healthy fats and protein. this spread is basically a dessert and thats all and has next to no nutrition. i have to keep reminding myself of that so i dont turn biscoffspreadonbread into one of my usual snack foods.
they smell like herbs not a good smell to dogs they want meat! im happy to say they got over their what ever it was and is back to all raw...frozenfreeze dried o im a happy camper!

this is the absolutely worst thing i have ever tasted in my entire life. i have been doing low carb for a long time so i understand that even though something is advertised as something such as a country biscuit that it wont have the same consistancy or taste that a regular biscuit would. however this was nothing even resembling or tasting like a biscuit. i would definitely not recommend this product. every last bit of this went into the trash along side the money i spent to purchase it.
summary: dixie carb counters country biscuit mix

text: very good. and i love the fact that it is just dry roosted. no added anything. will definitely order again.

this instant drink mix is already sweetened. i use it to add flavor to bottled water as well as making a pitcher full to leave in the refrigerator. ive found zuko instant drink products on warehouse deals for sale prices and have tried many of their flavors which all have been good with nice tropical flair and taste.

well this was mailed to pretoria s africa because they can not buy there and when last heard they were being rationed! with gusto and smiles! wish this were available there. great flavor and fun in the mouth if one is lacking in pleasures this is sure to please!

this is a tasty substitute for coffee. it contains barley rye chicory root dandelion root and beetroot but is surprisingly like coffee to the taste. it has no cafeine and no gluten! it is in powder form like instant coffee and can be served with milk or cream. delicious!
i got instead hello kitty pops dressed in blue and red with yellow shirt and a bow on the head.
kids loved the light up rings. i used them to fill up their goodie bags. great effect at the dark skating ring.

ive had other kind bars and this one is okay i dont particularly care for the taste. in my opinion its too sweet while i occasionally indulge in sweet things this isnt what i had expected with this product. every bar is 40g and there are 13g of sugar. yikes. i wish i had looked this up before i purchased this because i have nine more bars. whats worse instead of getting twelve bars my box only came with ten. i will not be ordering this or any other kind bars.

i love this stuff. im practically addicted! i use the monthly delivery option and usually order an extra case half way through. its great for hydration and a sweet treat after a long bike ride or even with a little white rum and pineapple after a long day. its just soooo good. try putting some in your rice cooker instead of water just use a few tablespoons extra... delicious!!!
summary: the best tasting coconut water by far and the biggest can.

text: please excuse the beginning of this review being the same as my review for black cherry but the facts are the same. what is switch a new refreshing drink that will dazzle you. the can is colorful 8.3 oz not a large drink and has a catchy saying 100 of what you want 0 of what you dont. what does that mean? according to the can there is no sugar added no preservatives no artificial colors gluten free no corn syrup and it is 100 juice carbonated.now this is definitely a breakthru for those with allergies and those looking for a more healthy drink. especially for our children. but it all comes down to one point how does it taste. lets face it if it doesnt taste good we probably are not going to drink it and our children definitely will not drink it and thats just the honest truth.kiwi berry switchnow here is a flavor that i could get use to in a hurry. this taste was bubbling with flavor and actually brought pleasure to my tastebuds. it was rich and smooth yet bursting with excitement at the same time. it did not leave an after taste that was unpleasant but left you wanting more.the blending of the flavors in this switch was excellent and definitely made this taster happy.i had my grandchild take a drink and she absolutely loved it and asked me to go purchase some. i recommend this flavor. truly a treat for the taste buds. very good.

i am a frequent user of bully sticks from other vendors online and from pet stores. these are listed as thick bully sticks. i usually buy thick ones from another vendor and my german shepherd pup loves them and they last a couple of days. these arrived and i was immediately disappointed. many of them are the thickness of a pencil or slightly thicker. they are about 13 the thickness of the thick bully sticks i usually buy. but i did not want to deal with sending them back so i gave one to my pup. it smelled horrible like a person who had not washed in weeks. my pup liked them okay but because they are so thin she can eat an entire 12 one in under an hour. will not buy these again.

i have used the native forest coconut milk for years. i have tried many others and this one is by far the best tasting plus it is organic. i go through enough of it that i signed up for a recurring delivery of a case. it is going to save me quite a bit over purchasing locally at my grocery store. i read the reviews talking about dented cans but ordered anyway. some that i buy at the grocery store are dented so i didnt feel it was a big deal either way. i received my case today and not a single can was dented.regarding the reviewer talking about the expiration date please disregard. they do not understand the coding system that is used. as explained in my reply to that comment the date code is a production code and is six letters. those that i received today were baajch which corresponded to a production date of september 10 2009. this is only 5 months ago.also the same reviewer talking about solids in the can may not realize that when coconut milk is colder below 76 degrees the oil will solidify. if you want it all liquid and smooth put the can in a pan of warm water for a while.this is an excellent product even better with amazons special pricing and free shipping for recurring orders. this is also backed by amazons excellent customer service noted by the unhappy customer.
this is not a gluten free product. oats unless specified contain gluten. for those in a gfcf diet i would not recommend this bar.

taste a bit like styrofoam but then again did not think it was going to taste like the best potato chips i have every eaten and i have eaten some really good chips. if you are looking for snack food that tastes good without being self indulgent then this product will fill the bill.
summary: not additive as most snack foods but but a good snack

text: this review is primarily for the pb2 product not the chocolate. as an avid pb fan i wanted to try these for the obvious caloric advantage over any other pb on the market. the pb2 has a definite natural pbproduct flavor and can be mixed to lend a similar consistency to peanut butter. that being said i found it is not as fulfilling when snacked on alone with a spoon. that being said i imagine it would make an amazing replacement for real pb in any cooking recipe or blending protein shake. i did enjoy the chocolate flavored pb2 on its own and would definitely buy it to snack on by itself again.

fantastic! ordered these as a surprise treat for my moms birthday along with the galettes with salted butter caramel french butter cookies 2 pack and she just loved everything about them commented about the excellent quality and charming tin. along with a separate ordered item of tazo fancy teas sampler and with everything gift wrapped individually it truly made a perfect gift to brighten up a drizzly rainy day! thanks so much for offering these what a find! would order again in a heartbeat! merci beaucoup!
summary: delicious tasty treats in delightful tin! superb!!

text: im seriously addicted to this stuff. its definitely one of my drinks. its so much healthier for you than soda and has less than half the amount of sugar of sports drinks like gatorade. i didnt even realize there was a peach mango flavor im going to go and look for it when i go to the store today!

i was kicking myself for purchasing this small bag of gum. i only bought it for convenience because i also ordered a gum ball machine. because of the freight i paid like 15 for a small bag of gum. go to your local convenience store and save money.

i have never been much of a fan of chips ahoy! chocolate chip cookies. i dont like hard chocolate chip cookies and i would only eat a chips ahoy! if i was stuck at a kids party or some other place where there was nothing better. now though chips ahoy! has launched two new soft chocolate chip cookies the one under review here chocofudge and megafudge. i think they are both pretty good but i think the chocofudge is better. the megafudge is almost like a brownie as many fudgestyle cookies are and i prefer a more conventional cookie. so if you are thinking of trying one of these chips ahoy! cookies you shouldnt be too disappointed with either one but i would go with the chocofudge. actually of the mass produced chocolate chip cookies i prefer the pepperidge farms soft baked nantucket chocolate chip cookie.
summary: not a bad soft chocolate chip cookie

text: these candies arrived looking a bit as if theyd been thrown about but the sellby date was still okay. i ate one . . . and it had the nastiest chemical taste! i threw the rest of the box away. i dont know whats in these things but mine were inedible.

i came to newmans own vanilla almond cereal only because i was obsessed with another cereal kellogs smart start. however i finally realized how much sugar i was eating and was wondering if i could still have a somewhat sweet cereal but one that wasnt so sugary he organic part is a bonus. while smart start has 43 g carbs 14 g sugar this cereal only has 24 g carbs 7 g sugar half the sugar! and its sweetened with some sugar but some honey as well which is a healthier sugar and doesnt cause your blood sugar to spike so much. and no high fructose corn syrup which im not that against but it some really try to avoid it.i dont think ill ever get rid of my sweet tooth but im sold on this cereal. my favorite way to eat it is with 12 a banana and a hand full of blueberries. yum. and by buying bulk i can save 11.50 of what they charge in the store for some reason you cant save any by buying smart start in bulk.
summary: great cereal it is sweet enough.

text: but very delicious just the same. if youre looking for a wee bit of a different flavor in the old favorite oreo this is just what youre looking for! love the size of the minis too.
bigelow pomegranate pizzazz herbal tea 20count boxes pack of 6is a great tea and a great buy from amazon especially with a subscription.

green mountain fair trade coffee which i got for being a bzz agent tastes great and makes you feel good while drinking it. i enjoy fair trade coffee because i like knowing my money is going to actual farmers at a fair price. but most importantly the coffee is smooth the taste is rich and it makes my morning go a little better. i highly recommend this. i have tried the nantucket flavor too which i really like. ful

gee... im getting a puppy in a couple of weeks and i was going to get him one of these. i have a medium for my adult corgi and it works great for him. the discs dont come out and he spends hours nawing away at the thing. i can definately recommend the medium. maybe the small is too small to work well?
summary: i love the medium.... im hoping the small will be as good

text: the product came on time and was exactly what i wanted. the only problem was that the bag was torn at the bottom. actually to be more specific the whole bottom was open. not too mush of a big deal because all of the candies are individually wrapped but still a bit annoying. please be more careful next time!

do not waste your money buying any other brands of the rosehip tea available in the us market. ive tried all of them from whole foods fresh market gnc organicnot organic from any possible grocery stores and had total disappointment. once youve tried the real rosehip tea your search for a good one will be endless as it was for me. i was wondering how is possible to sell a product under the name of rosehip tea with no even closest flavor of the rosehip or even worth no flavor at all like having a sewer water boiled and served. well maybe these manufacturers hope that the majority dont know the true flavor of a good tea and will buy their misleading product. dont trash your money! stop your search and buy this one the only rosehip tea that taste as rosehips. enjoy!
summary: the best rosehip tea in us

text: i didnt like this chai very much. perhaps it is because it is green tea instead of black in the mix. i drink organic gunpowder green tea almost every day but green tea in chair just doesnt suit my taste.
this vanilla is delicious in all my recipes. it came right on time and was wellpackaged. it is a good price for the quantity and great quality also.
i am not going to buy this again. the flavor is ok but not great.

i hesitate to write a review about a food because well one mans meat is another mans poison ... i like the nottoosweet and minimally processed taste of this brand the banana flavour is our favourite. the fruit and nut flavour lacks a little oomph and the fruit inside is too tangy for my taste buds so maybe too minimally processed?. also remember that all natural is not organic even if you find this in the health food section of your grocery store. our local target also carries this brand of granola and has the best price for it.

i love these gummy bears soo much and having a mother who was born in germany i grew up eating these! so when we ran out of star bursst for our candy jar at work i bought these to fill it up. the coworker love them! they are individually packaged with about 58 bears in each pouch i havent actually counted yet so that is a guess so its nice to be able to grab one and take it back to your desk and have a few to snack on.when i received the item they were fresh and not even close to the expiration date. very happy and defiantly recommend to anyone.

this was the worst thing i have ever ingested. i was sold with the super low calorie and fat intake but it was too good to be true. it tasted like non food. it tasted like rubber bands in sauce. or squid. it was terrible and now i have bags and bags of it going straight to the garbage. i think the bags should stop by the lab first for testing because theres some sort of mistake. this couldnt possibly have been meant to be eaten. people are not that cruel.try for yourself. i kid you not.

my wife has become a recent fan of chai tea so i looked for the highest rated chai tea on amazon and bought her a case for christmas. well i simply cant agree with the other reviewers. this tea has a very weak flavor and not nearly as tasty as the cheap grocery store tea she had grown to like. i am disappointed that we cant return it because we wont drink it and wasted almost 30.
summary: ugh... not as good as expected

text: i ordered skippy creamy pb from amazon.com a few months ago. its very oily and looks pretty unappealing when you open it. after wed already eaten 2 jars of it or so we got notice it was being recalled for salmonella. fortunately no one got sick.

these should be amazing. really just look at that picture! a chocolate chip cookie that is chewy on the outside and full of creamy fudge. good glory i could go into a happy coma just thinking about it.unfortunately they are not so good. the fudgey middle is actually just a bigger chocolate chip and the cookie is more crumbly and dry than chewy. the taste is heavily dominated by all of that chocolate and the chocolate while not bad is not good enough to stand on its own.dont break your heart by buying these. just look at the picture and dream. if you must but the chocofudge variety instead. i have eaten both nom nom cry nom nom and the megafudge surprisingly has less flavor.

most of the time when i order food products from amazon they arrive in good condition. these cookies however were in crumbs when we received them. it wasnt a packaging problem i think that just the way these cookies are made they dont ship well. the crumbs were tasty enough but we wont be reordering the cookies.

i probably just dont like macarons to begin with. the candy colored ones tasted like bitter medicine but looked very well prepared. the only one i could tolerate to eat was the peanut butter one. personally feel these are cuter to look at than to eat.
summary: tastes like medicine but decent. peanut butter ones are the best.

text: i would buy this product again and they had great delivery time. the ingredediance are very wholesome for myyorkees and they seem to be doing quite well eating it. thanx jim

these cookies are a great alternative for someone with a craving for something sweet. theyre much healthier than an ordinary cookie since theyre made with rolled whole oats and a multitude of ingredients containing healthy fats. for someone in a rush or looking for something onthego these are perfect.despite their taste and healthier attributes these cookies suffer from the same flaws that are evident in similar goods. once a box of cookies is opened its important to place them in an airtight container otherwise they harden quickly. a minor gripe of mine is that these cookies are dry due to the ingredients but its not a big deal if you have something with it such as a glass of milk.
i have purchased these cherries several times through amazon and i have never been disappointed. they are almost half the price that i would have to pay at the grocery store.

didnt try the original blueberry cool brew tea from celestial seasonings so we are not comparing this version to the previous version. all we can say is this is a delicious crisp green tea with just the right amount of blueberry flavor. have tried enjoyed some other flavors of the brand and like the idea of drinking a healthier version with green tea. these cool brew teas are a warm weather staple in our house.
had those little fish eggies on my daily hot dog franks with some extra hot ketchup and sauerkraut. also goes well with german bratwurst.

this product is great. i use it on my and my baby after showersbaths and it has cleared up my skin from many different blemishes dry spots red patches and red bumps i have had for years. i have also used it on my hair and it has helped get rid of the dry brittle frizz.since i use it everyday it has helped me not to get sunburned.i also have used it on popcorn so good and with cooking rice. cant wait to find more cooking uses for it.also a very good price and i love that i dont have to go to the store to get more when i run out.

tried these for the first time the other day and had to get a box of them. they come in three flavors rosemary and olive oil sea salt and lightly salted. sure the major ingredient is potato like a potato chip but they taste so much better! and healthier! it looks like it has potato tomato and spinach in it as the veggies. really delicious chips and each bag is 1 ounce which is a very good size! i think im addicted. try them at your own risk.

for solid fruits and vegetables like apples and bell peppers you put a drop or two on the fruit and rub it around. it creates some suds which stays on your hands so you can continue to wash the next few pieces. then you rinse them off. pretty easy. it does a great job and leaves items squeaky clean especially tomatoes which always tend to be sprayed with some kind of wax that feels greasy to me. and the product smells like licorice. for things that are not easy for rubbing like berries you need to make a soaking solution which does use a lot more of the product. im usually too lazy to get out a separate container for this so i tend not to use it for these types of produce. of course it would be great if it was easier for these types. but if you only use it for solid produce it does last a long time.

im not used to fancy food but this stuff might be worth the price. its well packed and there are actually pieces of tuna you can recognize. taste is very good packed in zoe olive oil. i would put some in sushi if i knew how.

izze fortified all natural sparkling juice comes in several flavors and i chose the apple when placing my order. being neither a physician nor a connoisseur of fruit juices i cant say much about the health aspects of this drink only its taste.i suppose a juice made with an all natural blend of pure fruit juice and sparkling water that is also caffeine and sugar free will reap greater benefits than a coke or pepsi but i found this drink a little too acidid tasting for my liking. i was expecting and would have preferred something a little smoother. it seemed closer to coke or pepsi than it did to say orange or apple juice and i think id just prefer to drink one of the latter than have an izze again.of course thats my opinion and when it comes to food products well we all like what we like dont we?i didnt care for izze fortified all natural sparkling juice. you however may find it to your liking.brian w. fairbanks

chances are if you are looking at dick van pattens natural balance you are looking into finding a quality cat food for you animals. im a firm believer in buying the best quality foods for my animals in order to ensure their optimum good health especially since the 2007 pet food recalls from melamine adulterated food. initially when i purchased this food that didnt factor into my decision.i had a longhaired cat who gifted me with hairballs on a frequent basis. a friend told me about this food and swore by it claiming her rugs and furniture no longer suffered from constant scrubbing. i decided to give natural balance a try and was amazed at the results. i no longer have that cat but did inherit another longhaired cutie pie who loves this food. i changed her food to this one a month ago gradually mixing it with her previous food and it somehow helps her body minimize the hairball activity. i want her to be healthy and happy and find the expense to be well worth it. this is brief blurb from their website information that can be found on the bag as well fresh chicken salmon meal new zealand lamb meal this unique blend of fresh high quality proteins provides the essential amino acids to help maintain strong muscle tone and a healthy shiny coat. taurine fortified to help maintain a healthy heart and good vision. fresh potatoes rich in potassium and an excellent source of highly digestible carbohydrates. preserved naturally to maintain freshness natural balance uses only mixed tocopherols vitamin e in all of its formulas and will always be free of artificial flavors colors and chemical preservatives. skin and coat essential fatty acids are combined to produce an excellent skin and coat for your cat. high digestibilityno artificial preservatives flavors colors or bleached ingredients.if you need to find out more you can check out this food at petco where i purchased it or head to the natural balance website. of course everyone has their own opinion and will look at several factors when purchasing for their animals. you and only you know your needs but i find that this food satisfies not only mine i dont have to invest in so many paper towels but obviously that of my cat. i was using a perfectly acceptable organic food but when i mixed this with it ... well lets just say she likes natural better than organic. im happy if shes happy and im not constantly cleaning up after her these days!
summary: both my cat and i love natural balance ... she is happy healthy and this food helps minimize the hairball activity!

text: this is the only ragu sauce that i have ever tasted that didnt seem to be a clone of campbells spaghettios. it was actually tasty for a product line that is notoriously bad.

my son loves all the ellas kitchen fruit veggie pouches along with plum organics as well. but this chicken meal... yuck. not only does it not smell appealing but it tastes awful. my son is 11 months and eats everything i put in front of him but this ellas kitchen chicken meal along with the ellas kitchen oh so creamy chicken and corn mash 4.5ounce pack of 7 is something he refuses to eat. i literally spoon it in his mouth and he sticks out his tongue and pushes it out as quick as he can.the only way i got him to eat this is by mixing it with fruit baby food with a ratio of 21 fruit to chicken. i recommend sticking with homemade chicken. i have not tried other meatbased baby foods but given how ellas kitchen tends to be incredibly tasty i can only imagine how bad other brands food must be.

i love splenda in my iced coffee and occasionally on plain cheerios. the package i received from amazon was well within the expiration date arrived on time and was the same granulated splenda i have come to love. it lasts me a very long time. the bag is huge!

i started buying yeast in bulk when i realized how much cheaper it was. i freeze the bulk of it and keep about 4 ounces in the fridge for immediate use.i make bread pizza dough and cinnamon rolls by hand. this yeast also performs well in the bread maker. very economical and makes yummy dough!

nice taste but too tough to chew for me. it has a good smell of coconut skin not too sweet. however i prefer the kind bar almond apricot without yogurt love it! since the bar is softerchewier. if you like a bit sweeter taste choose the one with yogurt.
summary: nice taste but too tough to chew for me.

text: first can i tried i was thrown off by the cucumber flavor. i grew up in mexico so im not scared of cucumbers at all we used to have cucumberade quite often it was actually the lack of sweetness that threw me off im used to drinking sweetened cucumberade so i have to admit i hated the taste of these at first. however i grabbed a second can a couple days later and must say ive now grown fond of the taste it is just so refreshing and light.too bad these are so expensive because theyre a great alternative to sodas or fake sugar based soft drinks.
i had wanted to try one of these gels for a while having had some from a food station whilst running the providence marathon. this has not disapointed and i use it during every run now.

i was so happy with the lemon shortbread cookies that i was really looking forward to the butter shortbread cookies! i was involved in girl scouts for 9 years and had my share of shortbreads! the size was good but i knew i was going to have a problem when they were baked around the outside but more than half of the cookies middles are raw. im going to put one in the oven and see if i can finish baking them. just so you dont do the dah thing dont put it in the microwave for 2 minutes your smoke alarms will go off!!! this may have been just a batch missed and i will see as i have a case to go thru! happy eating!!

i bought these on a whim at my local health food store and wow i was very impressed with the taste! you wouldnt know the shells were glutenfree for one and the filling was better than any id ever had! full of flavor and just perfect really.the only thing is i saw that the bag said it had 3 servings in it so when pouring it out into my pan i was a little disappointed that there were only 6 shells. so they consider 2 shells a serving. yeah right. well anyway i did end up eating the whole thing which was too much. 3 would be fine if you had a salad or meatballs or something else to go with them but 2. not! 4 is where i shouldve stopped but i just couldnt stand putting 2 shells in the fridge so i forced myself to eat them. shame on me but they sure were good!i paid 7 for them at the store i believe. so amazons price seems way too pricey! see if your local health food store has them before spending this extra money here and for shipping! they really are probably the best health food ive ever bought. besides ricemellow creme! that stuff is awesome!!!
this product is a total waste of money!! i think it actually attracted the squarrels to my roof.. i was better off using the pepper from my kitchen then this waste of a product..
nice tea. started drinking it for the cold season. i have not been sick at all this winter so maybe it did the trick.

we have been using ring of fire for 15 years and love it. it has great flavor without being so hot you can not enjoy the flavor.we sometimes buy directly from mike and diane who are the owners and makers of this wonderful sauce. they are so nice to deal with always send a nice email when i order.you will not be sorry to have this for your meals. we use it on just about everything and go though nearly a bottle a month. there are a lot of flavors we prefer garden fresh check out their web page for other things such as jerkey etc.
this is really the best on the market for gluten free!! i have made all kinds of things with it even my picky kids who do not eat gluten free love it!
this is a total rip off. thought i was receiving a case as in 4 paks 412 but this is actually only 1 pak 12 cans for the price 1 pak is usually 3.995.49 in the store not 17 25 dollars. do not buy!

great tasting soup. even better if you just use two cups of water instead of three and one cup of half and half instead of milk. gives it a lot richer flavor also add a handful of small frozen cooked salad shrimp near the end of the cooking cycle. adds a little bulk and gives you a little something to chew on.
i dont like any chicken concentrates but this is the best one and i like to have it on hand for when it is called for in recipes.

the royal canin urinary formula is so tasty that two of the cats who eat it dont even have kidney issues. they just like the taste! the one who has had the crystals continues to remain crystalfree so yay.
summary: my vet sells this for over 50...so this price is great

text: the product looks exactly like the image shown no marking on the package at all. so if youd like to know the nutritional content of the package its not available.the mix contains 30 40 peanuts. so if you like peanuts youre going to be very happy. i dont mind peanuts but i was looking for an asian mix and the high peanut content is not what i was looking for. perhaps half the content is asian savories and the balance is almonds. the wasabi peas are very lightly flavored and have no discernible flavor.on the whole im mostly disappointed but not enough to return the order. as a result i have 6 lbs of marginally palatable snacks.
